assets.title: APP tab stay duration
assets.description: Shows the number of unique users that use your app every day.
assets.queryText:
{
  "kind": "InsightVizNode",
  "source": {
    "kind": "TrendsQuery",
    "tags": null,
    "series": [
      {
        "kind": "EventsNode",
        "math": "hogql",
        "name": "screen_duration",
        "event": "screen_duration",
        "math_hogql": "sum(case when properties.`duration_seconds` <3600 then properties.`duration_seconds` else 0 end )/60/count(distinct distinct_id) as duration_avg",
        "properties": [
          {
            "key": "person_mode",
            "type": "event_metadata",
            "label": null,

assets.description: Sample orders joined with products

columns.name: ID
columns.description: This is a unique ID for the product. It is also called the “Invoice number” or “Confirmation number” in customer facing emails and screens.

columns.name: USER_ID
columns.description: The id of the user who made this order. Note that in some cases where an order was created on behalf of a customer who phoned the order in, this might be the employee who handled the request.

columns.name: PRODUCT_ID
columns.description: The product ID. This is an internal identifier for the product, NOT the SKU.

columns.name: SUBTOTAL
columns.description: The raw, pre-tax cost of the order. Note that this might be different in the future from the product price due to promotions, credits, etc.

columns.name: TAX
columns.description: This is the amount of local and federal taxes that are collected on the purchase. Note that other governmental fees on some products are not included here, but instead are accounted for in the subtotal.

columns.name: CREATED_AT
columns.description: The date and time an order was submitted.

columns.name: Age
columns.description: Age of the customer in years.

columns.name: EMAIL
columns.description: The contact email for the account.

columns.name: STATE
columns.description: The state or province of the account’s billing address.

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the user who owns an account

columns.name: TITLE
columns.description: The name of the product as it should be displayed to customers.

assets.title: 首次配网成功率—original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "
select 
    x.*,
    -- 统一时间差：下一条时间 - 当前时间（单位：秒）
    (eventTime_next - eventTime)/1000 as time_diff
from 
	(select 
	    ----to_date(dt) dt,
		FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dt,
	    uid,
	    get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') as eventTime,
		get_json_object(content,'$.appVersion') as appversion,
	    elementid,
	    get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId') as eventSessionId,
	    get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id') as device_unique_id,
		get_json_object(content,'$.os') as os,
		get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.from_page_id') as from_page_id,
		get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_num') as device_num,
		get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_connection_type') as device_connection_type,
		get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_model') as device_model,
		get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') as is_auto_discovery_card,
	
	    -- 1. 统一分组：dt,uid,会话ID,设备ID,元素ID
	    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
	        PARTITION BY 
	            dt,
	            uid,
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
	            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id'),
	            elementid 
	        ORDER BY 
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
	    ) as rn,
	
	    -- 3. 按 dt,uid 分组的全局序号（保留）
	    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
	        PARTITION BY 
	            dt,uid 
	        ORDER BY 
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
	    ) as rn_user,
	
	    -- ===================== 核心修改 =====================
	    -- 统一分区：dt,uid,eventSessionId,device_unique_id
	    LEAD(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime'), 1) OVER (
	        PARTITION BY 
	            dt,
	            uid,
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
	            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id')
	        ORDER BY 
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
	    ) as eventTime_next,
	    
	    LEAD(elementid, 1) OVER (
	        PARTITION BY 
	            dt,
	            uid,
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
	            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id')
	        ORDER BY 
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
	    ) as elementid_next,

	    LEAD(get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.connect_result'), 1) OVER (
	        PARTITION BY 
	            dt,
	            uid,
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
	            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id')
	        ORDER BY 
	            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
	    ) as connect_result_next		
	    
	from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di 
	where dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 40 DAY) and FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 40 DAY) 
	  and elementid in ('31800001','31800002')
) x
where elementid = '31800001' and rn = 1 [[AND from_page_id = {{from_page_id}}]]",
      "template-tags": {
        "from_page_id": {
          "name": "from_page_id",
          "id": "91b44593-b5ae-47fe-8c15-5a4a62565d12",
          "type": "text",
          "display-name": "From Page ID"
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 配网明细表
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select
    to_date(dt) as 日期,
    uid as 用户ID,
    get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') as 会话ID,
    from_unixtime(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') as bigint) / 1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') as 事件时间,
    case
        when elementid = '31800001' then '开始连接'
        when elementid = '31800002' then '结束连接'
        else '其他'
    end as 操作类型,

    -- 截图里的所有参数（全中文）
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') as 来源页面ID,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_num') as 设备数量,

    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') as 设备连接方式,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model') as 设备型号,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') as 是否自动发现卡片,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') as 设备唯一ID,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') as 配网结果,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.duration') as 配网耗时,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.error_info') as 失败原因

from
    dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di

where
    dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    and dt >= '2026-03-27'
    and elementid in ('31800001','31800002')
order by 日期 desc,uid,事件时间"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 设备售卖数_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT 
    str_to_date(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS 日期,
    category_name_level5 AS 五级分类,
    SUM(order_device_cn) AS 设备售卖数,
    SUM(bind_dev_cn_by_status) AS 设备绑定数,
    
    -- 新增：设备累计售卖数（按五级分类分区，按日期累加）
    SUM(SUM(order_device_cn)) OVER (
        PARTITION BY category_name_level5 
        ORDER BY str_to_date(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
    ) AS 设备累计售卖数,
    
    -- 新增：设备累计绑定数（按五级分类分区，按日期累加）
    SUM(SUM(bind_dev_cn_by_status)) OVER (
        PARTITION BY category_name_level5 
        ORDER BY str_to_date(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
    ) AS 设备累计绑定数,
    
    -- 新增：累计绑定率（累计绑定数 / 累计售卖数，并处理分母为0的情况）
    ROUND(
        SUM(SUM(bind_dev_cn_by_status)) OVER (
            PARTITION BY category_name_level5 
            ORDER BY str_to_date(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
        ) / 
        NULLIF(
            SUM(SUM(order_device_cn)) OVER (
                PARTITION BY category_name_level5 
                ORDER BY str_to_date(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
            ), 
        0), 
    4) AS 累计绑定率

FROM ads_user_device_stat_info_df
WHERE 
     category_name_level5 IN (
        'M9吸奶器',
        '台式APP白噪音',
        'M5 Smart吸奶器',
        'Air 1吸奶器',
        'BM04婴儿监视器',
        'WN05彩虹款APP白噪音',
        'T31贴片式体温计',
        'M10 吸奶器',
		'T31贴片式体温计',
'M9吸奶器',
'M5Smart吸奶器',
'Air1吸奶器',
'WN02 台式APP白噪音',
'BM04婴儿监视器',
'WN05彩虹款APP白噪音',
'W1吸奶器',
'BM08智能婴儿监视器'
    )
GROUP BY 日期, 五级分类
ORDER BY 五级分类, 日期;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 瑜伽球活跃数据分析
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select 
dt `日期`,
count(case when elementid='31700018' then uid end  ) as`兑换页访问次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500059' then uid end  ) as`发起兑换次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500057' then uid end  ) as`发起扫描次数`

,count(case when elementid='31700001' then uid end  ) as `课程列表页访问次数`
,count(case when elementid='31700002' then uid end  ) as `课程详情页访问次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500014' then uid end  ) as `开始课程次数`
,count(case when elementid='31700007' then uid end  ) as `播放完成页访问次数`
,if(count(case when elementid='31700007' then uid end  ) / count(case when elementid='12500014' then uid end  ) >1,null,count(case when elementid='31700007' then uid end  ) / count(case when elementid='12500014' then uid end  )) as `课程播放完成率率`
,count(case when elementid='12500013' then uid end  ) as `动作GIF查看次数`
,count(case when elementid in ('12500022','12500020') then uid end  ) as `分享次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500022' then uid end  ) as `分享到FB次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500020' then uid end  ) as `分享到社区次数`

,count(distinct case when elementid='31700018' then uid end  ) as `兑换页访问用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='12500059' then uid end  ) as `发起兑换用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='12500057' then uid end  ) as `发起扫描用户数`

,count(distinct case when elementid='31700002' then uid end  ) as `课程详情页用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='31700001' then uid end  ) as `课程列表页用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='12500014' then uid end  ) as `开始课程用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='31700007' then uid end  ) as `播放完成页用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='12500013' then uid end  ) as `动作GIF查看用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid in ('12500022','12500020') then uid end  ) as `分享用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='12500022' then uid end  ) as `分享到FB用户数`
,count(distinct case when elementid='12500020' then uid end  ) as `分享到社区用户数`


from dwd_tp_yoga_ball_log_di
group by dt
order by dt desc"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器分型号留存数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select 
	'M9' model,act_n 第n天,x.uv/y.uv 留存率
from	
	(select 
		act_n,count(1) uv
	from 
		dws_breast_pump_bind_app_act_info_df
	where 
		first_bind_date between date_sub(current_date(), 91) and date_sub(current_date(), 31)
		and bind_model like '%M9%'
	group by act_n) x 
join 
	(select 
		count(1) uv
	from 
		dws_breast_pump_bind_app_act_info_df
	where 
		first_bind_date between date_sub(current_date(), 91) and date_sub(current_date(), 31)
		and bind_model like '%M9%'
		and act_n =0) y on 1=1

union all 

select 
	'Air1' model,act_n 第n天,x.uv/y.uv 留存率
from	
	(select 
		act_n,count(1) uv
	from 
		dws_breast_pump_bind_app_act_info_df
	where 
		first_bind_date between date_sub(current_date(), 91) and date_sub(current_date(), 31)
		and bind_model like '%Air1%'
	group by act_n) x 
join 
	(select 
		count(1) uv
	from 
		dws_breast_pump_bind_app_act_info_df
	where 
		first_bind_date between date_sub(current_date(), 91) and date_sub(current_date(), 31)
		and bind_model like '%Air1%'
		and act_n =0) y on 1=1

union all 

select 
	'M5P0' model,act_n 第n天,x.uv/y.uv 留存率
from	
	(select 
		act_n,count(1) uv
	from 
		dws_breast_pump_bind_app_act_info_df
	where 
		first_bind_date between date_sub(current_date(), 91) and date_sub(current_date(), 31)
		and bind_model like '%M5P0%'
	group by act_n) x 
join 
	(select 
		count(1) uv
	from 
		dws_breast_pump_bind_app_act_info_df
	where 
		first_bind_date between date_sub(current_date(), 91) and date_sub(current_date(), 31)
		and bind_model like '%M5P0%'
		and act_n =0) y on 1=1
"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器分型号生命周期数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select 
  to_date(app_last_act_date) 日期
  ,'M9' model
  ,count(1) 用户数
  ,sum(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 生命时长累计
  ,AVG(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 人均生命时长
from 
  dws_app_user_tag_info_df
where 
  bind_model like '%M9%'
  --and app_last_act_date >= '2026-01-01'
group by 
  日期
  
UNION ALL  

select 
  to_date(app_last_act_date) 日期
  ,'Air1' model
  ,count(1) 用户数
  ,sum(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 生命时长累计
  ,AVG(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 人均生命时长
from 
  dws_app_user_tag_info_df
where 
  bind_model like '%Air1%'
  --and app_last_act_date >= '2026-01-01'
group by 
  日期
  
UNION ALL  

select 
  to_date(app_last_act_date) 日期
  ,'M5P0' model
  ,count(1) 用户数
  ,sum(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 生命时长累计
  ,AVG(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 人均生命时长
from 
  dws_app_user_tag_info_df
where 
  bind_model like '%M5P0%'
  and app_last_act_date >= '2025-11-01'
group by 
  日期

UNION ALL  

select 
  to_date(app_last_act_date) 日期
  ,'M10' model
  ,count(1) 用户数
  ,sum(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 生命时长累计
  ,AVG(datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date)+1) 人均生命时长
from 
  dws_app_user_tag_info_df --a join (select distinct uid from dwd_app_device_binding_info where model = 'W1' ) b on a.uid = b.uid
where 
  bind_model = 'W1'
  --and app_last_act_date >= '2026-01-01'
group by 
  日期
",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器绑定天数分布
assets.businessDomain: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
tags: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select 
	x.dt 日期,
	model,
case 
	when datediff(dt, createdate) between 0 and  0   then '0天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 1 and  1   then '1天'
	when datediff(dt, createdate) between 2 and  2   then '2天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 3 and  4   then '3-4天'
	when datediff(dt, createdate) between 5 and  7   then '5-7天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 8 and 14   then '8-14天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 15 and 21  then '15-21天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 22 and 28  then '22-28天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 29 and 35  then '29-35天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 36 and 42  then '36-42天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 43 and 49  then '43-49天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 50 and 56  then '50-56天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 57 and 63  then '57-63天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 64 and 70  then '64-70天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 71 and 77  then '71-77天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 78 and 84  then '78-84天'
    when datediff(dt, createdate) between 85 and 90  then '85-90天'
    else '超过90天'
end as 绑定天数,
	count(distinct y.uid) 90天内绑定吸奶器用户数,
	--count(1) pv,
	count(distinct z.uid) 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃用户数,
	count(distinct z.uid)/count(distinct y.uid) 活跃率
from 
	(select distinct to_date(app_active_date) dt from dws_app_user_tag_info_df where app_active_date >= '2025-12-01') x 
join 
	(SELECT distinct model,UID,date_format(dev_create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') createdate,date_format(dev_update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') up_date,status
	from dwd_app_device_binding_info
	where TYPE = 1
		--and date_format(dev_create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= 
		AND model IN ('M9','M5P0','Air1')) y on 1=1
left join 
	(select distinct event_date,uid from dwd_app_user_flag_info where act_flag = 1) z on x.dt = z.event_date and y.uid = z.uid
where 
	(status = 1 OR up_date > dt) and datediff(dt, createdate) between 0 and 90    
group by 
		x.dt,
	model,
	绑定天数


--select distinct event_date,uid from dwd_app_user_flag_info where act_flag = 1

		 ",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 活跃率数据_original_v2
assets.businessDomain: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
tags: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select 
    x.dt as 日期,
    model,
    case 
        --when datediff(dt, createdate) = 0 then '0天'
        when datediff(dt, createdate) between 0 and 7 then '0-7天'
        when datediff(dt, createdate) between 8 and 30 then '8-30天'
        when datediff(dt, createdate) between 31 and 90 then '31-90天'
        else '其他'
    end as 绑定天数,
    count(distinct y.uid) as 90天内绑定吸奶器用户数,
    count(distinct z.uid) as 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃用户数,
    count(distinct z.uid)/count(distinct y.uid) as 活跃率
from 
    (select distinct to_date(app_active_date) dt from dws_app_user_tag_info_df where app_active_date >= '2025-12-01') x 
join 
    (SELECT distinct model, UID, date_format(dev_create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') createdate, date_format(dev_update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') up_date, status
    from dwd_app_device_binding_info
    where TYPE = 1
        AND model IN ('M9','M5P0','Air1','M10')) y on 1=1
left join 
    (select distinct event_date, uid from dwd_app_user_flag_info where act_flag = 1) z on x.dt = z.event_date and y.uid = z.uid
where 
    (status = 1 OR up_date > dt) 
    and datediff(dt, createdate) between 0 and 90    
group by 
    x.dt,
    model,
    绑定天数
"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸乳计划渗透数据-original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT --简化版本
    dt ,
    dau AS DAU,
    plan_version_dau AS `吸乳计划版本DAU`,
    plan_version_bind_dau AS `吸乳计划版本绑定吸奶器DAU`,
    plan_penetration_users AS `吸乳计划功能渗透用户数`,
    plan_penetration_bind_users AS `吸乳计划功能渗透吸奶器用户数`,
    plan_version_coverage_rate AS `吸乳计划版本覆盖率`,
    plan_version_bind_rate AS `吸乳计划版本吸奶器用户占比`,
    plan_version_penetration_rate AS `吸乳计划版本功能渗透率`,
    plan_version_bind_penetration_rate AS `吸乳计划版本吸奶器用户功能渗透率`
FROM dws_app_breast_pump_plan_penetration_di
ORDER BY dt DESC;

--新版本
-- select 
-- 	x.dt
-- 	,count(distinct x.uid) DAU
-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本DAU

-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1 and breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,z.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本绑定吸奶器DAU
-- 	,count(distinct y.uid) 吸乳计划功能渗透用户数
-- 	,count(distinct if(breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,y.uid,null)) 吸乳计划功能渗透吸奶器用户数
-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null))/count(distinct x.uid) 吸乳计划版本覆盖率
-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1 and breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,z.uid,null))/count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本吸奶器用户占比
-- 	,count(distinct y.uid)/count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null))  吸乳计划版本功能渗透率	
-- 	,count(distinct if(breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,y.uid,null))/count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1 and breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,z.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本吸奶器用户功能渗透率
-- from 
-- 	dwd_tp_version_os_log_di x 
-- left join 
-- 	(select distinct dt,uid 
-- 	from dwd_tp_ai_log_di 
-- 	where (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(get_json_object(content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(get_json_object(content, '$.appVersion'),2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(get_json_object(content, '$.appVersion'),1,1)>1)
-- 		and (elementid != '12400050' or (elementid = '12400050' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.source') in (7,8,9,10,100,101,120,121) ))
-- 		and (elementid != '31100011' or (elementid = '31100011' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.from_element_name')='record_button' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.from_page_id') !='breast_pump_record_page'))
-- 		--and (elementid != '31100011' or (elementid = '31100011' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.lactation_plan_status')='plan_created'))
-- 		--and elementid != '31100011'
-- 		--and (elementid != '12400048' or (elementid = '12400048' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.lactation_plan_status') ='plan_created' ))
-- 		--and (elementid != '12400049' or (elementid = '12400049' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.lactation_plan_status') ='plan_created' ))
-- 		and (elementid != '31100010' or (elementid = '31100010' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.from_element_name') !='treasure_pumping_icon' ))
-- 		and (elementid != '12400052' or (elementid = '12400052' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.from_element_name') !='treasure_pumping_icon' ))
-- 		and dt >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
-- 		--'31100010','12400052'		
-- 		) y on x.dt =y.dt and x.uid = y.uid
-- left join 
-- 	dws_app_user_tag_info_df z on x.uid = z.uid
-- where 
-- 	x.dt >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
-- group by x.dt 
-- order by dt






--老版本
-- select 
-- 	x.dt
-- 	,count(distinct x.uid) DAU
-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本DAU

-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1 and breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,z.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本绑定吸奶器DAU
-- 	,count(distinct y.uid) 吸乳计划功能渗透用户数
-- 	,count(distinct if(breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,y.uid,null)) 吸乳计划功能渗透吸奶器用户数
-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null))/count(distinct x.uid) 吸乳计划版本覆盖率
-- 	,count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1 and breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,z.uid,null))/count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本吸奶器用户占比
-- 	,count(distinct y.uid)/count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1,x.uid,null))  吸乳计划版本功能渗透率	
-- 	,count(distinct if(breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,y.uid,null))/count(distinct if(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(app_version, 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(app_version,2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(app_version,1,1)>1 and breast_pump_bind_date<=x.dt,z.uid,null)) 吸乳计划版本吸奶器用户功能渗透率
-- from

-- 	from dwd_tp_ai_log_di 
-- 	where (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(get_json_object(content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 222 and SUBSTR(get_json_object(content, '$.appVersion'),2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(get_json_object(content, '$.appVersion'),1,1)>1)
-- 		and (elementid != '12400050' or (elementid = '12400050' and get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.source') in (7,8,9,10,100,101,110,111,120,121) ))

"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 活跃率数据_original_v3
assets.businessDomain: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
tags: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select 
    x.dt as 日期,
    model,
    -- case 
    --     --when datediff(dt, createdate) = 0 then '0天'
    --     when datediff(dt, createdate) between 0 and 7 then '0-7天'
    --     when datediff(dt, createdate) between 8 and 30 then '8-30天'
    --     when datediff(dt, createdate) between 31 and 90 then '31-90天'
    --     else '其他'
    -- end as 绑定天数,
	os,
    count(distinct y.uid) as 90天内绑定吸奶器用户数,
    count(distinct z.uid) as 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃用户数,
    count(distinct z.uid)/count(distinct y.uid) as 活跃率
from 
    (select distinct to_date(app_active_date) dt from dws_app_user_tag_info_df where app_active_date >= '2025-12-01') x 
join 
    (SELECT distinct model, UID, date_format(dev_create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') createdate, date_format(dev_update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') up_date, status
    from dwd_app_device_binding_info
    where TYPE = 1
        AND model IN ('M9','M5P0','Air1','M10')) y on 1=1
left join 
    (select distinct event_date, uid from dwd_app_user_flag_info where act_flag = 1) z on x.dt = z.event_date and y.uid = z.uid
join 
	(select distinct uid,os
	from dwd_tp_version_os_log_di) i on y.uid = i.uid
where 
    (status = 1 OR up_date > dt) 
    and datediff(dt, createdate) between 0 and 90    
group by 
    x.dt,
    model,
    --绑定天数,
	os
",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器用户操作APP吸奶器功能数据_original
assets.businessDomain: 吸奶器用户操作APP吸奶器功能数据
tags: 吸奶器用户操作APP吸奶器功能数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH user_first_bind AS (
    -- 用户设备最早绑定日期
    SELECT 
        uid,
        model,
        MIN(to_date(dev_create_time)) AS 最早绑定日期
    FROM dwd_app_device_binding_info x 
    WHERE status = 1
    GROUP BY model,uid  
)
SELECT
    t.dt AS 日期,
    t.设备型号,
    t.是否新绑定用户,

    -- ==================== UV（原有保留）====================
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.uid) AS 活跃用户数,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(
        add_level_exposure_cnt>0 OR reduce_level_exposure_cnt>0 OR
        start_pause_exposure_cnt>0 OR device_shutdown_exposure_cnt>0 OR
        add_pump_record_exposure_cnt>0 OR mode_adjust_exposure_cnt>0 OR
        massage_mode_exposure_cnt>0 OR pump_mode_exposure_cnt>0 OR
        mix_mode_exposure_cnt>0 OR personal_mode_exposure_cnt>0 OR
        personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt>0
    , t.uid, NULL)) AS 吸奶器功能操作行为uv,

    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(device_homepage_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 设备首页uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(pump_control_page_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 吸奶器控制页uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(pump_end_page_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 吸奶器结束页uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(add_level_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 增加档位uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(reduce_level_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 减少档位uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(start_pause_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 启动暂停uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(device_shutdown_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 关闭设备uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(add_pump_record_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 新增吸奶记录uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 添加奶量记录页uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(mode_adjust_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 模式调整uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(massage_mode_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 按摩模式uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(pump_mode_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 吸乳模式uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(mix_mode_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 混合模式uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(personal_mode_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 个性化模式uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 个性化模式列表页uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 个性化模式配置页uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt>0,t.uid,NULL)) AS 个性化模式编辑uv,

    -- ==================== PV（曝光次数 新增）====================
    SUM(t.exposure_cnt) AS 总曝光pv,
    SUM(t.device_homepage_exposure_cnt) AS 设备首页pv,
    SUM(t.pump_control_page_exposure_cnt) AS 吸奶器控制页pv,
    SUM(t.pump_end_page_exposure_cnt) AS 吸奶器结束页pv,
    SUM(t.add_level_exposure_cnt) AS 增加档位pv,
    SUM(t.reduce_level_exposure_cnt) AS 减少档位pv,
    SUM(t.start_pause_exposure_cnt) AS 启动暂停pv,
    SUM(t.device_shutdown_exposure_cnt) AS 关闭设备pv,
    SUM(t.add_pump_record_exposure_cnt) AS 新增吸奶记录pv,
    SUM(t.add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt) AS 添加奶量记录页pv,
    SUM(t.mode_adjust_exposure_cnt) AS 模式调整pv,
    SUM(t.massage_mode_exposure_cnt) AS 按摩模式pv,
    SUM(t.pump_mode_exposure_cnt) AS 吸乳模式pv,
    SUM(t.mix_mode_exposure_cnt) AS 混合模式pv,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_exposure_cnt) AS 个性化模式pv,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt) AS 个性化模式列表页pv,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt) AS 个性化模式配置页pv,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt) AS 个性化模式编辑pv,

    -- ==================== Session 数（新增）====================
    SUM(t.session_cnt) AS 总session数,
    SUM(t.device_homepage_session_cnt) AS 设备首页session数,
    SUM(t.pump_control_page_session_cnt) AS 吸奶器控制页session数,
    SUM(t.pump_end_page_session_cnt) AS 吸奶器结束页session数,
    SUM(t.add_level_session_cnt) AS 增加档位session数,
    SUM(t.reduce_level_session_cnt) AS 减少档位session数,
    SUM(t.start_pause_session_cnt) AS 启动暂停session数,
    SUM(t.device_shutdown_session_cnt) AS 关闭设备session数,
    SUM(t.add_pump_record_session_cnt) AS 新增吸奶记录session数,
    SUM(t.add_milk_record_page_session_cnt) AS 添加奶量记录页session数,
    SUM(t.mode_adjust_session_cnt) AS 模式调整session数,
    SUM(t.massage_mode_session_cnt) AS 按摩模式session数,
    SUM(t.pump_mode_session_cnt) AS 吸乳模式session数,
    SUM(t.mix_mode_session_cnt) AS 混合模式session数,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_session_cnt) AS 个性化模式session数,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_list_page_session_cnt) AS 个性化模式列表页session数,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_config_page_session_cnt) AS 个性化模式配置页session数,
    SUM(t.personal_mode_edit_session_cnt) AS 个性化模式编辑session数

FROM (
    -- M9
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        'M9' AS 设备型号,
        CASE WHEN b.最早绑定日期 = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS 是否新绑定用户
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'M9'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M9%'

    UNION ALL
    -- Air1
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        'Air1' AS 设备型号,
        CASE WHEN b.最早绑定日期 = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS 是否新绑定用户
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'Air1'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%Air1%'

    UNION ALL
    -- M5P0
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        'M5P0' AS 设备型号,
        CASE WHEN b.最早绑定日期 = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS 是否新绑定用户
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'M5P0'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%'

    UNION ALL
    -- M10
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        'M10' AS 设备型号,
        CASE WHEN b.最早绑定日期 = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS 是否新绑定用户
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'M10'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M10%'
    UNION ALL
    -- 全部
    SELECT 
        a.*,
        '全部' AS 设备型号,
        CASE WHEN first_bind_date = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS 是否新绑定用户
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a 
    where a.bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%' or a.bind_model LIKE '%Air1%' or a.bind_model LIKE '%M9%' or a.bind_model LIKE '%M10%'
) t

GROUP BY 日期, 设备型号, 是否新绑定用户
ORDER BY 日期, 设备型号, 是否新绑定用户;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: baby喂奶、换尿布、睡眠信息_original
assets.businessDomain: 婴儿喂奶、换尿布、睡眠信息记录看板
tags: 婴儿喂奶、换尿布、睡眠信息记录看板
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
    to_date(start_time) AS 统计日期,
    CASE record_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '喂奶'
        WHEN 2 THEN '睡眠'
        WHEN 3 THEN '换尿布'
    END AS 行为大类,
    CASE
        WHEN record_type = 1 AND sub_type = 1 THEN '亲喂'
        WHEN record_type = 1 AND sub_type = 2 THEN '奶瓶喂'
        WHEN record_type = 1 AND sub_type = 3 THEN '奶粉'
        ELSE ''
    END AS 行为细分,

    -- 通用指标
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 用户数UV,
    COUNT(1) AS 记录数PV,

    -- 亲喂次均时长（分钟）
    ROUND(
        AVG(
            IF(record_type = 1 AND sub_type = 1 AND start_time != end_time,
               LEAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time), 60),
               NULL
            )
        ), 2
    ) AS 亲喂次均时长分钟,

    -- 喂奶次均奶量
    ROUND(
        AVG(
            IF(record_type = 1 AND sub_type IN (2,3), feeding_amount, NULL)
        ), 2
    ) AS 喂奶次均奶量毫升,

    -- 睡眠平均时长（分钟）
    ROUND(
        AVG(
            IF(record_type = 2, LEAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time), 1440), NULL)
        ), 2
    ) AS 睡眠平均时长分钟,

    -- 换尿布新增维度统计
    COUNT(IF(record_type=3 AND diaper_status IS NOT NULL, 1, NULL)) AS 尿布状态记录数,
    COUNT(IF(record_type=3 AND urine_color IS NOT NULL, 1, NULL)) AS 尿液颜色记录数,
    COUNT(IF(record_type=3 AND stool_color IS NOT NULL, 1, NULL)) AS 便便颜色记录数,
    COUNT(IF(record_type=3 AND stool_status IS NOT NULL, 1, NULL)) AS 便便状态记录数

FROM dwd_usr_t_baby_record_df
WHERE 
    record_type IN (1,2,3)
    AND to_date(start_time) between '2026-01-01' and date_sub(current_date(), 1)

GROUP BY
    to_date(start_time),
    行为大类,
    行为细分

UNION ALL

-- 喂奶汇总（不分类型）
SELECT
    to_date(start_time) AS 统计日期,
    '喂奶' AS 行为大类,
    '喂奶汇总' AS 行为细分,
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 用户数UV,
    COUNT(1) AS 记录数PV,
    0 AS 亲喂次均时长分钟,
    0 AS 喂奶次均奶量毫升,
    0 AS 睡眠平均时长分钟,
    0 AS 尿布状态记录数,
    0 AS 尿液颜色记录数,
    0 AS 便便颜色记录数,
    0 AS 便便状态记录数

FROM dwd_usr_t_baby_record_df
WHERE
    record_type = 1
    AND to_date(start_time) between '2026-01-01' and date_sub(current_date(), 1)
	

GROUP BY
    to_date(start_time),
    行为大类,
    行为细分


UNION ALL

-- 喂奶汇总（不分类型）
SELECT
    统计日期,
    '喂奶/睡眠/换尿布三种行为俱全'  AS 行为大类,
    '其它' AS 行为细分,
    COUNT(1) AS 用户数UV,
    sum(pv) AS 记录数PV,
    0 AS 亲喂次均时长分钟,
    0 AS 喂奶次均奶量毫升,
    0 AS 睡眠平均时长分钟,
    0 AS 尿布状态记录数,
    0 AS 尿液颜色记录数,
    0 AS 便便颜色记录数,
    0 AS 便便状态记录数
from 
	(select to_date(start_time) AS 统计日期,uid,count(distinct record_type) 任务类型数,count(1) pv
	FROM dwd_usr_t_baby_record_df
	WHERE
	    record_type in (1,2,3)
	    AND to_date(start_time) between '2026-01-01' and date_sub(current_date(), 1)
	group by 1,2) x	
where 任务类型数 = 3
GROUP BY
   1

union all 

select   
	to_date(start_time) AS  统计日期,
    '喂奶/睡眠/换尿布任一行为'  AS 行为大类,
    '其它' AS 行为细分,
    COUNT(distinct uid) AS 用户数UV,
    count(1) AS 记录数PV,
    0 AS 亲喂次均时长分钟,
    0 AS 喂奶次均奶量毫升,
    0 AS 睡眠平均时长分钟,
    0 AS 尿布状态记录数,
    0 AS 尿液颜色记录数,
    0 AS 便便颜色记录数,
    0 AS 便便状态记录数
	FROM dwd_usr_t_baby_record_df
	WHERE
	    record_type in (1,2,3)
	    AND to_date(start_time) between '2026-01-01' and date_sub(current_date(), 1)
	group by 1






",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶记录数据_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
    to_date(operate_time) AS 日期,

    -- 核心UV/PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 操作uv,
    COUNT(id) AS 记录pv,

    -- 人均操作吸奶次数
    COUNT(id) / COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 人均操作吸奶次数,

    -- 双侧 / 单侧 吸奶记录数（按你写的口径）
    COUNT(IF(left_capacity_check > 0 AND right_capacity_check > 0, uid, NULL)) AS 一对吸奶器吸奶记录数,
    COUNT(IF(left_capacity_check = 0 OR right_capacity_check = 0, uid, NULL)) AS 单只吸奶器吸奶记录数,

    -- 吸奶量（修复语法 + 空值处理）
    avg(left_capacity_check + right_capacity_check) AS `次均吸奶量(ml)`,
    sum((left_capacity_check + right_capacity_check)) / COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS `人均吸奶量(ml)`,

    -- 次均操作时长（0值不计算）
    AVG(IF(operate_duration_check > 0, operate_duration_check, NULL))/60 AS `次均操作时长(分钟)`
from 
	dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_di
where 
	ds >= '2026-01-01' and to_date(operate_time) >= '2026-01-01'
	and (left_capacity_check > 0 or right_capacity_check > 0)
	and (email NOT LIKE "%rootglobal.net" or email is null)
	--and source IN (1,2,3,4)
group by 
	日期
order by 日期
",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: amazon 吸奶器订单分布
assets.businessDomain: 吸奶器M5 smart 绑定率洞察
tags: 吸奶器M5 smart 绑定率洞察
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select
spu_name
,case when spu_name in ('M9吸奶器','M5 Smart吸奶器','Air 1吸奶器') then '智能吸奶器' else '非智能吸奶器' end  as pump_type
---,date_format(str_to_date(replace(order_time, ', ', ' '), '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i'), '%Y-%m') AS order_month
,date_format(order_time, '%Y%m') AS year_month

,count(distinct order_id) as orders 
,count(distinct case when refund_time is not null then order_id end ) as refund_orders
from dwd_sale_channel_order_detail
where channel = 'amazon' and spu_name like '%吸奶器' --and country_code ='US' 
and order_date>='2025-01-01' ---AND refund_time is not null
and order_status=3
---limit 2323

group by spu_name,year_month,pump_type
---order by dd desc
order by year_month asc,orders asc"
    }
  ]
}

assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "WITH user_first_bind AS (
    SELECT 
        uid,
        model,
        MIN(to_date(dev_create_time)) AS first_bind_dt
    FROM dwd_app_device_binding_info
    WHERE status = 1
    GROUP BY model, uid
),
base AS (
    -- M9
    SELECT 
        a.dt, a.uid,
        'M9' AS device_model,
        CASE WHEN b.first_bind_dt = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS is_new_bind,
        a.device_homepage_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_control_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_end_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.reduce_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.start_pause_exposure_cnt,
        a.device_shutdown_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_pump_record_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.mode_adjust_exposure_cnt,
        a.massage_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.mix_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'M9'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M9%'

    UNION ALL

    -- Air1
    SELECT 
        a.dt, a.uid,
        'Air1' AS device_model,
        CASE WHEN b.first_bind_dt = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS is_new_bind,
        a.device_homepage_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_control_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_end_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.reduce_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.start_pause_exposure_cnt,
        a.device_shutdown_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_pump_record_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.mode_adjust_exposure_cnt,
        a.massage_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.mix_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'Air1'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%Air1%'

    UNION ALL

    -- M5P0
    SELECT 
        a.dt, a.uid,
        'M5P0' AS device_model,
        CASE WHEN b.first_bind_dt = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS is_new_bind,
        a.device_homepage_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_control_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_end_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.reduce_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.start_pause_exposure_cnt,
        a.device_shutdown_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_pump_record_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.mode_adjust_exposure_cnt,
        a.massage_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.mix_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'M5P0'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%'

UNION all
    -- M10
    SELECT 
        a.dt, a.uid,
        'M10' AS device_model,
        CASE WHEN b.first_bind_dt = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS is_new_bind,
        a.device_homepage_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_control_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_end_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.reduce_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.start_pause_exposure_cnt,
        a.device_shutdown_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_pump_record_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.mode_adjust_exposure_cnt,
        a.massage_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.mix_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a
    LEFT JOIN user_first_bind b ON a.uid = b.uid AND b.model = 'M10'
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M10%'
    UNION ALL

    -- 全部
    SELECT 
        a.dt, a.uid,
        '全部' AS device_model,
        CASE WHEN a.first_bind_date = a.dt THEN '新绑定用户' ELSE '老用户' END AS is_new_bind,
        a.device_homepage_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_control_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_end_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.reduce_level_exposure_cnt,
        a.start_pause_exposure_cnt,
        a.device_shutdown_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_pump_record_exposure_cnt,
        a.add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.mode_adjust_exposure_cnt,
        a.massage_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.pump_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.mix_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt,
        a.personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt
    FROM dws_app_breast_pump_log_analytics_ext_di a 
    WHERE a.bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%' OR a.bind_model LIKE '%Air1%' OR a.bind_model LIKE '%M9%' OR a.bind_model LIKE '%M10%'
)
SELECT
    dt AS 日期,
    device_model AS 设备型号,
    is_new_bind AS 是否新绑定用户,
    event_type AS 事件类型,
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS uv
FROM (
    -- 设备首页曝光
    SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '设备首页曝光' AS event_type FROM base WHERE device_homepage_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '吸奶器控制页曝光' FROM base WHERE pump_control_page_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '吸奶器结束页曝光' FROM base WHERE pump_end_page_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '增加档位' FROM base WHERE add_level_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '减少档位' FROM base WHERE reduce_level_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '启动暂停' FROM base WHERE start_pause_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '关闭设备' FROM base WHERE device_shutdown_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '新增吸奶记录' FROM base WHERE add_pump_record_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '添加奶量记录页曝光' FROM base WHERE add_milk_record_page_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '模式调整' FROM base WHERE mode_adjust_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '按摩模式' FROM base WHERE massage_mode_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '吸乳模式' FROM base WHERE pump_mode_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '混合模式' FROM base WHERE mix_mode_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '个性化模式' FROM base WHERE personal_mode_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '个性化模式列表页曝光' FROM base WHERE personal_mode_list_page_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '个性化模式配置页曝光' FROM base WHERE personal_mode_config_page_exposure_cnt > 0
    UNION ALL SELECT dt, uid, device_model, is_new_bind, '个性化模式编辑' FROM base WHERE personal_mode_edit_exposure_cnt > 0
) t
GROUP BY 日期, 设备型号, 是否新绑定用户, 事件类型
ORDER BY 日期, 设备型号, 是否新绑定用户, 事件类型;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: amazon 吸奶器订单价格 分布
assets.businessDomain: 吸奶器M5 smart 绑定率洞察
tags: 吸奶器M5 smart 绑定率洞察
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    spu_name,
    -- 2025 Q4 价格分位数
    round(percentile_approx(CASE WHEN period = '2025Q4' THEN item_price END, 0.5), 2) AS median_2025q4,
    round(percentile_approx(CASE WHEN period = '2025Q4' THEN item_price END, 0.25), 2) AS p25_2025q4,
    round(percentile_approx(CASE WHEN period = '2025Q4' THEN item_price END, 0.75), 2) AS p75_2025q4,
    count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period = '2025Q4' THEN order_id END) AS cnt_2025q4,
    
    -- 2026年 3月+4月 合并
    round(percentile_approx(CASE WHEN period = '2026_0304' THEN item_price END, 0.5), 2) AS median_2026_0304,
    round(percentile_approx(CASE WHEN period = '2026_0304' THEN item_price END, 0.25), 2) AS p25_2026_0304,
    round(percentile_approx(CASE WHEN period = '2026_0304' THEN item_price END, 0.75), 2) AS p75_2026_0304,
    count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period = '2026_0304' THEN order_id END) AS cnt_2026_0304

FROM (
    SELECT
        order_id,
        sales_amount item_price,
        spu_name,
        -- 时间段定义：2025Q4 vs 2026年3+4月
        CASE
            WHEN order_date BETWEEN '2025-10-01' AND '2025-12-31' THEN '2025Q4'
            WHEN order_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-04-30' THEN '2026_0304'
        END AS period
    FROM dwd_sale_channel_order_detail
    WHERE
        channel = 'amazon'
        AND spu_name LIKE '%吸奶器'
        AND order_date BETWEEN '2025-10-01' AND '2026-04-30'
        AND currency_code = 'USD'
        AND sales_qty = 1
) t
WHERE period IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY spu_name
ORDER BY spu_name;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: amazon 吸奶器订单分布 -对比 2025 VS 2026
assets.businessDomain: 吸奶器M5 smart 绑定率洞察
tags: 吸奶器M5 smart 绑定率洞察
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    spu_name,
    pump_type,
    -- 2025 Q4
    q4_orders,
    q4_refund_orders,
    q4_refund_orders / q4_orders  AS 2025q4_refund_rate_pct,

    -- 2026年3月+4月 合计
    mar_apr_orders,
    mar_apr_refund_orders,
   mar_apr_refund_orders / mar_apr_orders  AS 2026mar_apr_refund_rate_pct

FROM (
    SELECT
        spu_name,
        case when spu_name in ('M9吸奶器','M5 Smart吸奶器','Air 1吸奶器')
             then '智能吸奶器'
             else '非智能吸奶器'
        end as pump_type,

        -- 2025 Q4
        count(distinct case when order_date between '2025-10-01' and '2025-12-31'
                            then order_id end) as q4_orders,
        count(distinct case when order_date between '2025-10-01' and '2025-12-31'
                            and refund_time is not null
                            then order_id end) as q4_refund_orders,

        -- 2026年3月 + 4月 合计
        count(distinct case when order_date between '2026-03-01' and '2026-04-30'
                            then order_id end) as mar_apr_orders,
        count(distinct case when order_date between '2026-03-01' and '2026-04-30'
                            and refund_time is not null
                            then order_id end) as mar_apr_refund_orders

    FROM dwd_sale_channel_order_detail
    WHERE
        channel = 'amazon'
        and spu_name like '%吸奶器'
        and order_date between '2025-10-01' and '2026-04-30'
        and order_status = 3
	group BY pump_type, spu_name
) t
GROUP BY spu_name, pump_type,
         q4_orders, q4_refund_orders,
         mar_apr_orders, mar_apr_refund_orders
ORDER BY pump_type, spu_name;"
    }
  ]
}

    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select 
---dt `日期`,
count(case when elementid='31700018' then uid end  ) as`兑换页访问次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500059' then uid end  ) as`发起兑换次数`
,count(case when elementid='12500057' then uid end  ) as`发起扫描次数`

,count(distinct case when elementid='12500022' then uid end  ) as `分享到FB用户数`

assets.title: 当天吸乳次数分布_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "WITH user_daily_total AS (
    -- 步骤1：先统计【每个用户每天的总使用次数】（不管用了多少设备）
    SELECT
        uid,
        DATE(CAST(operate_time AS DATETIME)) AS use_date,
        COUNT(*) AS daily_total_usage  -- 核心：用户当天所有设备的总使用次数
    FROM dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_ext_di
    WHERE
        (email NOT LIKE "%rootglobal.net" or email is null)
        AND operate_duration_check > 60
        --AND source IN (1,2,3,4)
        AND deleted = 0
        AND operate_time IS NOT NULL
        AND uid IS NOT NULL
		and (left_capacity_check > 0 or right_capacity_check > 0)
    GROUP BY uid, use_date  -- 仅按用户+日期分组，不包含设备
),
user_model_relation AS (
    -- 步骤2：关联用户当天使用的设备型号（用于后续分型号统计）
    SELECT DISTINCT  -- 去重：一个用户当天用同一型号多次，只记一次
        uid,
        DATE(CAST(operate_time AS DATETIME)) AS use_date,
        model
    FROM dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_ext_di
    WHERE
        (email NOT LIKE "%rootglobal.net" or email is null)
        AND operate_duration_check > 60
        --AND source IN (1,2,3,4)
        AND deleted = 0
        AND operate_time IS NOT NULL
        AND uid IS NOT NULL
       AND (model like '%M5P0%' or model like '%M9%' or model like '%Air1%' or model like '%W1%')
	   and (left_capacity_check > 0 or right_capacity_check > 0)
),
usage_range_base AS (
    -- 步骤3：合并“用户总次数”和“用户-型号关联”，划分使用次数区间
    SELECT
        t1.uid,
        t1.daily_total_usage,
        t2.model,
        -- 按用户总次数划分区间
        CASE
            WHEN t1.daily_total_usage = 1 THEN '1次'
            WHEN t1.daily_total_usage = 2 THEN '2次'
            WHEN t1.daily_total_usage = 3 THEN '3次'
            WHEN t1.daily_total_usage = 4 THEN '4次'
            WHEN t1.daily_total_usage = 5 THEN '5次'
            WHEN t1.daily_total_usage >= 6 THEN '6次以上'
            ELSE '其他'
        END AS daily_usage_range
    FROM user_daily_total t1
    LEFT JOIN user_model_relation t2 
        ON t1.uid = t2.uid AND t1.use_date = t2.use_date  -- 按用户+日期关联型号
)
-- 步骤4：透视统计（行=使用次数区间，列=整体/各型号用户数）
SELECT
    daily_usage_range 当天吸乳次数,
	CASE daily_usage_range
        WHEN '1次' THEN 1
        WHEN '2次' THEN 2
        WHEN '3次' THEN 3
        WHEN '4次' THEN 4
        WHEN '5次' THEN 5
        WHEN '6次以上' THEN 6
        ELSE 7
    END 排序,
    -- 整体用户数：该频次下的去重用户数（核心：统计用户数，非次数）
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 总用户数,
    -- M5P0用户数：该频次下使用过M5P0的去重用户数
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN model like '%M5P0%' THEN uid END) AS `M5 Smart用户数`,
    -- M9用户数：该频次下使用过M9的去重用户数
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN model like '%M9%' THEN uid END) AS M9用户数,
    -- Air1用户数：该频次下使用过Air1的去重用户数
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN model like '%Air1%' THEN uid END) AS Air1用户数,
	COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN model like '%W1%' THEN uid END) AS M10用户数
FROM usage_range_base
GROUP BY daily_usage_range,排序
;
",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸乳时间段(小时)分布_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH hour_dim AS (
    -- 生成0-23小时的维度表（确保每个小时都有数据）
    SELECT 0 AS hour_num UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL
    SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL
    SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL
    SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL
    SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23
),
raw_data AS (
    -- 解析时间并提取小时，统计整体+各型号的原始记录数
    SELECT
        HOUR(CAST(operate_time AS DATETIME)) AS hour_num,  -- 提取小时数（0-23）
        COUNT(*) AS record_count,  -- 整体记录数
        COUNT(CASE WHEN model like '%M5P0%' THEN 1 END) AS M5P0_record_count,  -- M5P0记录数
        COUNT(CASE WHEN model like '%M9%' THEN 1 END) AS M9_record_count,  -- M9记录数
        COUNT(CASE WHEN model like '%Air1%' THEN 1 END) AS Air1_record_count,  -- Air1记录数
		COUNT(CASE WHEN model like '%W1%' THEN 1 END) AS M10_record_count
    FROM dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_ext_di --select * from dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_ext_di
    WHERE
        (email NOT LIKE "%rootglobal.net" or email is null)
        --AND source IN (1,2,3,4)
        AND deleted = 0
        AND operate_time IS NOT NULL  -- 过滤空值
       -- AND (model like '%M5P0%' or model like '%M9%' or model like '%Air1%') -- 仅统计目标型号
		and (left_capacity_check > 0 or right_capacity_check > 0)
    GROUP BY hour_num
)
-- 关联维度表，补全所有小时（无数据的小时记为0）
SELECT
    hd.hour_num AS hour_of_day,  -- 小时数（0=凌晨0点，20=晚上8点）
    COALESCE(rd.record_count, 0) AS record_count,  -- 整体记录数（无数据则0）
    COALESCE(rd.M5P0_record_count, 0) AS M5P0_record_count,  -- M5P0记录数（无数据则0）
    COALESCE(rd.M9_record_count, 0) AS M9_record_count,  -- M9记录数（无数据则0）
    COALESCE(rd.Air1_record_count, 0) AS Air1_record_count,  -- Air1记录数（无数据则0）
	COALESCE(rd.M10_record_count, 0) AS M10_record_count
FROM hour_dim hd
LEFT JOIN raw_data rd ON hd.hour_num = rd.hour_num
ORDER BY hd.hour_num;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸乳天数分布_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "WITH a AS (
    SELECT
        DISTINCT 
        uid,
        IF(model LIKE '%M9%', 1, 0) AS is_M9,
        IF(model LIKE '%M5P0%', 1, 0) AS is_M5,
        IF(model LIKE '%Air1%', 1, 0) AS is_air1,
		IF(model LIKE '%W1%', 1, 0) AS is_M10,
        DATE(CAST(operate_time AS DATETIME)) AS use_date
    FROM dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_ext_di
    WHERE
        (email NOT LIKE "%rootglobal.net" or email is null)
        AND operate_duration_check > 60
        --AND source IN (1, 2, 3, 4)
        AND deleted = 0
        AND operate_time IS NOT NULL
        AND uid IS NOT NULL
		and (left_capacity_check > 0 or right_capacity_check > 0)
),
user_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        uid,
        COUNT(DISTINCT use_date) AS active_days,
        MAX(is_M9) AS is_M9,
        MAX(is_M5) AS is_M5,
        MAX(is_air1) AS is_air1,
		MAX(is_M10) AS is_M10
    FROM a
    GROUP BY uid
),
user_bins AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        CASE 
            WHEN active_days = 1 THEN '1天'
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN '2-3天'
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN '4-7天'
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN '8-14天'
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 15 AND 30 THEN '15-30天'
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60天'
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90天'
            WHEN active_days > 90 THEN '90天以上'
            ELSE '其他'
        END AS day_range_label,
        CASE 
            WHEN active_days = 1 THEN 1
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN 2
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN 3
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN 4
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 15 AND 30 THEN 5
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN 6
            WHEN active_days BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN 7
            WHEN active_days > 90 THEN 8
            ELSE 9
        END AS sort_key
    FROM user_stats
)
SELECT 
    day_range_label AS `使用天数区间`,
	sort_key,
    COUNT(uid) AS `总计人数`,
    SUM(is_M9) AS `M9人数`,
    SUM(is_M5) AS `M5人数`,
    SUM(is_air1) AS `Air1人数`,
	SUM(is_M10) AS `M10人数`
FROM user_bins
GROUP BY sort_key, day_range_label
ORDER BY sort_key;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: Smart板块贴子曝光与点击_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,
    -- 妈妈文章统计
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300130', uid, NULL)) AS `妈妈板块文章曝光人数`,    
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300132', uid, NULL)) AS `妈妈板块文章点击人数`,
	COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300132', uid, NULL))/COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300130', uid, NULL)) `妈妈板块文章uv ctr`,

	COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300130', 1, NULL)) AS `妈妈板块文章曝光次数`,
    COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300132', 1, NULL)) AS `妈妈板块文章点击次数`,
	COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300132', 1, NULL))/COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300130', 1, NULL))  `妈妈板块文章pv ctr`,
    
    -- 宝宝文章统计
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300131', uid, NULL)) AS `宝宝板块文章曝光人数`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300133', uid, NULL)) AS `宝宝板块文章点击人数`,
	COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300133', uid, NULL))/COUNT(DISTINCT IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300131', uid, NULL)) `宝宝板块文章uv ctr`,

	COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300131', 1, NULL)) AS `宝宝板块文章曝光次数`,
    COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300133', 1, NULL)) AS `宝宝板块文章点击次数`,
	COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300133', 1, NULL))/COUNT(IF(get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') = '12300131', 1, NULL))   `宝宝板块文章pv ctr`
FROM dwd_tp_smart_log_di
WHERE dt >= '2026-04-01' 
  AND get_json_object(content,'$.elementId') IN ('12300130', '12300131', '12300132', '12300133')
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt DESC;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 绑定型号用户分布数
assets.businessDomain: 普庆 朱的个人集合
tags: 普庆 朱的个人集合
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH date_spine AS (
    SELECT DATE_ADD('2026-01-01', INTERVAL n DAY) AS dt
    FROM (
        SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () - 1 AS n
        FROM dwd_app_device_binding_info
        LIMIT 365
    ) t
    WHERE DATE_ADD('2026-01-01', INTERVAL n DAY) <= CURRENT_DATE()
),

device_events AS (
    SELECT
        uid,
        model,
        deviceid,
        status,
        DATE(dev_create_time)  AS event_date,
        DATE(LEAD(dev_create_time) OVER (
            PARTITION BY uid, deviceid
            ORDER BY dev_create_time
        ))                     AS next_event_date
    FROM dwd_app_device_binding_info
    WHERE 1 = 1
      [[AND model IN ({{model_filter}})]]
),

daily_model_cnt AS (
    SELECT
        d.dt,
        e.model,
        COUNT(DISTINCT e.uid) AS active_bind_users
    FROM date_spine d
    JOIN device_events e
        ON d.dt >= e.event_date
        AND (e.next_event_date IS NULL OR d.dt < e.next_event_date)
        AND e.status = 1
    GROUP BY d.dt, e.model
),

valid_models AS (
    SELECT model
    FROM daily_model_cnt
    GROUP BY model
    HAVING MAX(active_bind_users) >= 20
)

SELECT
    dt          AS stat_date,
    model,
    active_bind_users
FROM daily_model_cnt
WHERE model IN (SELECT model FROM valid_models)
ORDER BY stat_date, model;",
      "template-tags": {
        "model_filter": {
          "type": "text",
          "name": "model_filter",
          "id": "13eb3239-94bf-4f67-a5c6-fbb4da044775",
          "display-name": "设备型号"
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: AI吸乳计划完成率_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select 
	to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(task_start_time / 1000)) AI吸乳计划日期
	,if(to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(task_start_time / 1000))>='2026-04-23',1,0) is_chosoe
	,count(distinct uid) 待完成吸乳计划用户数
	,count(distinct if(status in (2,4),uid,null)) 完成吸乳计划用户数
	,count(distinct if(status in (2,4),uid,null)) / count(distinct uid) AI吸乳计划uv完成率
	
	,count(1) 待完成吸乳计划次数
	,count(if(status in (2,4),uid,null)) 完成吸乳计划次数
	,count(if(status in (2,4),uid,null))/count(1) AI吸乳计划pv完成率
	,count(distinct if(status in (2,4) and get_json_object(ext_config,'$.completeType') = 1,uid,null)) 手动完成吸乳计划用户数
	,count(if(status in (2,4) and get_json_object(ext_config,'$.completeType') = 1,uid,null)) 手动完成吸乳计划次数
	,count(distinct if(status in (2,4) and get_json_object(ext_config,'$.completeType') = 2,uid,null)) 自动完成吸乳计划用户数
	,count(if(status in (2,4) and get_json_object(ext_config,'$.completeType') = 2,uid,null)) 自动完成吸乳计划次数	
from dwd_usr_t_user_scheduled_reminder_calendar_df 
where task_type = 5   
	and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(task_start_time / 1000)) >= '2026-04-01' 
	and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(task_start_time / 1000)) <= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
group by AI吸乳计划日期,is_chosoe
order by AI吸乳计划日期 desc",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 耗材管理事件uv分布_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31801010', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材控制面板页曝光`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31801001', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材列表页曝光`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31801002', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材详情页曝光`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12601006', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材详情页点击视频播放`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31801003', uid, NULL)) AS `设备耗材更换指引页曝光`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12601001', uid, NULL)) AS `点击购买`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12601002', uid, NULL)) AS `购买二次确认弹窗点击选项`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31801004', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材更换历史页曝光`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31801005', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材更换周期配置页曝光`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12601005', uid, NULL)) AS `点击确认重置/取消重置耗材`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12601003', uid, NULL)) AS `用户点击耗材推送提醒`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12601004', uid, NULL)) AS `用户点击消息中心耗材消息`
FROM dwd_tp_consumables_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), 30)
    AND elementid IN (
        '31801010','31801001','31801002','12601006','31801003',
        '12601001','12601002','31801004','31801005','12601005',
        '12601003','12601004'
    )
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt DESC;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 手动添加设备配网漏斗_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,
    -- 基础 UV 指标（已删除配网引导页UV）
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800005', uid, NULL)) AS `设备添加页UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '11300002', uid, NULL)) AS `点击设备图标UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800009', uid, NULL)) AS `设备发现页UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800010', uid, NULL)) AS `设备连接中页UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12600010', uid, NULL)) AS `完成连接Done点击UV`,

    -- 环节间漏斗转化率 (LEAST封顶1，保留5位小数)
    -- 第一步：添加页 -> 点击图标
    ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '11300002', uid, NULL)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800005', uid, NULL)), 0), 1), 5) AS `设备添加页->点击设备图标漏斗`,
    
    -- 第二步：点击图标 -> 设备发现页（跳过引导页直连）
    ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800009', uid, NULL)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '11300002', uid, NULL)), 0), 1), 5) AS `点击设备图标->设备发现页漏斗`,
    
    -- 第三步：发现页 -> 连接中
    ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800010', uid, NULL)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800009', uid, NULL)), 0), 1), 5) AS `设备发现页->设备连接中页漏斗`,
    
    -- 第四步：连接中 -> 完成点击
    ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12600010', uid, NULL)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800010', uid, NULL)), 0), 1), 5) AS `设备连接中页->完成连接Done点击漏斗`,

    -- 全链路转化率
    ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '12600010', uid, NULL)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IF(elementid = '31800005', uid, NULL)), 0), 1), 5) AS `设备添加页->完成连接Done点击UV漏斗`
FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_wifi_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND dt >= '2026-04-18'
    AND elementid IN ('31800005', '11300002', '31800008', '31800009', '31800010', '12600010')
    AND (
        GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.page_type') = '1' 
        OR GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.page_type') IS NULL
    )
    AND CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 5), '.', '') AS INT) >= 226
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt DESC;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: ogc内容数据表现
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "--字段：id，标题，状态，发布时间，创建时间，点赞量，评论量，收藏量，浏览量，访客量。
select id,
title 标题,
case when show_status = 1 then '有效' else '无效' end as 状态,
DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(release_time / 1000)) 发布时间,
DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time_stamp / 1000)) 创建时间,
digg_count 点赞量,
comment_count 评论量,
collect_count 收藏量,
view_count 阅读数量,
uv_count 浏览用户数
from dwd_usr_t_lute_community_article_df
order by uv_count desc",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 耗材管理事件pv分布_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '31801010', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材控制面板页曝光`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '31801001', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材列表页曝光`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '31801002', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材详情页曝光`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '12601006', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材详情页点击视频播放`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '31801003', uid, NULL)) AS `设备耗材更换指引页曝光`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '12601001', uid, NULL)) AS `点击购买`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '12601002', uid, NULL)) AS `购买二次确认弹窗点击选项`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '31801004', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材更换历史页曝光`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '31801005', uid, NULL)) AS `耗材更换周期配置页曝光`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '12601005', uid, NULL)) AS `点击确认重置/取消重置耗材`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '12601003', uid, NULL)) AS `用户点击耗材推送提醒`,
    COUNT( IF(elementid = '12601004', uid, NULL)) AS `用户点击消息中心耗材消息`
FROM dwd_tp_consumables_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), 30)
    AND elementid IN (
        '31801010','31801001','31801002','12601006','31801003',
        '12601001','12601002','31801004','31801005','12601005',
        '12601003','12601004'
    )
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt DESC;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: wifi配置数据_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt,
    uid,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content,'$.eventTime')/1000) AS 事件时间,
    elementid,
    CASE elementid
        WHEN '31800005' THEN '设备添加页曝光'
        WHEN '11300002' THEN '设备添加页-点击设备图标'
        WHEN '31800008' THEN '配网引导页曝光'
        WHEN '31800009' THEN '可连接设备发现页曝光'
        WHEN '31800010' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-设备连接中曝光'
        WHEN '12600010' THEN '配网结束页-点击Done'
        WHEN '12600007' THEN '可连接设备发现页-点击Connect'
        WHEN '12600015' THEN '可连接设备发现页-点击退出'
        WHEN '31800013' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页曝光'
        WHEN '12600014' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-点击 next'
        WHEN '31800014' THEN '配网通讯状态'
        WHEN '12600016' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-点击others'
        WHEN '12600022' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-点击保存密码'
        WHEN '12600017' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-点击忽略本地网络'
        WHEN '12600018' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-点击刷新网络列表'
        WHEN '12600019' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-点击不支持的网络图标'
        WHEN '31800015' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-连接异常提示'
        WHEN '31800016' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-未发现可用WiFi提示'
        WHEN '12600020' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-未发现可用WiFi提示-手动配置网络'
        WHEN '12600021' THEN 'wifi 配网流程页-本地网络权限设置页-按钮点击'
        ELSE '其他' 
    END AS event_name,
    GET_JSON_OBJECT(content,'$.extraData') AS 特殊属性
FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_wifi_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND dt >= '2026-04-18'
    AND elementid IN ('31800005', '11300002', '31800008', '31800009', '31800010', '12600010', 
                      '12600007', '12600015', '31800013', '12600014', '31800014', '12600016', 
                      '12600022', '12600017', '12600018', '12600019', '31800015', '31800016', 
                      '12600020', '12600021')
    AND (
        GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.page_type') = '1' 
        OR GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.page_type') IS NULL
    )
    AND CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 5), '.', '') AS INT) >= 226;
"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: 扫码下载APP_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,
    -- 提取扫码来源类型
    GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') AS `扫码来源类型`,
    
    -- 仅统计这三个事件的 PV
    COUNT(IF(elementid = '31900230', 1, NULL)) AS `落地页曝光PV`,
    COUNT(IF(elementid = '31900232', 1, NULL)) AS `落地页点击下载PV`,
    COUNT(IF(elementid = '31900231', 1, NULL)) AS `跳转应用市场PV`

FROM dwd_tp_download_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) -- 最近30天
    AND elementid IN ('31900230', '31900231', '31900232')
GROUP BY 
    dt, 
    `扫码来源类型`
ORDER BY 
    dt DESC, 
    `落地页曝光PV` DESC;"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: 三方工具扫包装/设备二维码打开APP_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,
    -- 1. 扫包装二维码指标 (匹配 'package')
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') LIKE '%package%', uid, NULL)) AS `扫包装二维码UV`,
    COUNT(IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') LIKE '%package%', 1, NULL)) AS `扫包装二维码PV`,

    -- 2. 扫设备二维码指标 (匹配 'device')
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') LIKE '%device%', uid, NULL)) AS `扫设备二维码UV`,
    COUNT(IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') LIKE '%device%', 1, NULL)) AS `扫设备二维码PV`,

    -- 3. 总计指标 (统计该 elementid 范围内的全量数据)
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS `总UV`,
    COUNT(1) AS `总PV`

FROM dwd_tp_download_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    -- 包含三方唤起(31900001)和APP内扫码(31900002)
    AND elementid IN ('31900001') 
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt DESC;
"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: Momcozy APP 扫包装/设备二维码_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt AS `日期`,GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.os') os,uid,
    GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') AS `扫码来源类型`,
    GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.model') AS `设备型号`,
    
    -- 扫描结果 PV 展开
    COUNT(IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.scan_result') = 'unsupport', 1, NULL)) AS `不支持PV`,
    COUNT(IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.scan_result') = 'already_bound', 1, NULL)) AS `提示已绑定PV`,
    COUNT(IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.scan_result') = 'over_limit', 1, NULL)) AS `设备数量超过上限PV`,
    COUNT(IF(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.scan_result') = 'pass', 1, NULL)) AS `配网引导页PV`,
    
    -- 合计指标
    COUNT(1) AS `总扫码PV`

FROM dwd_tp_download_log_di
WHERE 
    dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) -- 最近30天
    AND elementid = '31900002'
GROUP BY 
    dt, os,uid,
    `扫码来源类型`,
    `设备型号`
ORDER BY 
    dt DESC, 
    `总扫码PV` DESC



	"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: Momcozy APP 扫包装/设备二维码跳转配网引导页漏斗_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "WITH scan_data AS (
    -- 步骤 1：筛选扫码成功的用户
    SELECT 
        dt,
        uid,
        GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.os') AS os,
        GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') AS qrcode_type,
        GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.model') AS model,
        COUNT(1) AS scan_pv
    FROM dwd_tp_download_log_di
    WHERE dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND elementid = '31900002'
      AND GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.scan_result') = 'pass'
    GROUP BY dt, uid, os, qrcode_type, model
),
guide_data AS (
    -- 步骤 2：筛选从扫码进入配网引导页的用户
    SELECT 
        dt,
        uid,
        GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_qrcode_type') AS qrcode_type,
        COUNT(1) AS guide_pv
    FROM dwd_tp_download_log_di
    WHERE dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND elementid = '31800008'
      AND GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') = 'app_scan'
    GROUP BY dt, uid, qrcode_type
)
-- 步骤 3：关联并汇总
SELECT 
    s.dt AS `日期`,
    s.os AS `系统`,
    s.qrcode_type AS `扫码来源类型`,
    s.model AS `设备型号`,
    
    -- 基础指标
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.uid) AS `扫码成功UV`,
    SUM(s.scan_pv) AS `扫码成功PV`,
    
    COUNT(DISTINCT g.uid) AS `进入配网引导页UV`,
    SUM(IFNULL(g.guide_pv, 0)) AS `进入配网引导页PV`,
    
    -- 转化漏斗 (保留5位小数)
    ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT g.uid) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.uid), 0), 1), 5) AS `扫码->引导页转化率`

FROM scan_data s
LEFT JOIN guide_data g ON s.dt = g.dt AND s.uid = g.uid AND s.qrcode_type = g.qrcode_type
GROUP BY 
    s.dt, 
    s.os, 
    s.qrcode_type, 
    s.model
ORDER BY 
    s.dt DESC, 
    `扫码成功UV` DESC;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: 手动记录吸奶时长数据报表
assets.businessDomain: 7. 平台产品团队 报表及看板
tags: 7. 平台产品团队 报表及看板
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
    to_date(operate_time) AS 日期,
	--to_date(ds) AS 日期1,
    -- 核心UV/PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 填写记录用户数,
	count(distinct if(operate_duration_check > 0 ,uid,null)) AS 填写吸奶时长用户数,
    COUNT(id) AS 记录次数,
	count(if(operate_duration_check > 0 ,uid,null)) AS 填写吸奶时长次数,
    -- 人均操作吸奶次数
    COUNT(id) / COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS 人均操作记录次数,

    -- -- 双侧 / 单侧 吸奶记录数（按你写的口径）
    -- COUNT(IF(left_capacity_check > 0 AND right_capacity_check > 0, uid, NULL)) AS 一对吸奶器吸奶记录数,
    -- COUNT(IF(left_capacity_check = 0 OR right_capacity_check = 0, uid, NULL)) AS 单只吸奶器吸奶记录数,

    -- -- 吸奶量（修复语法 + 空值处理）
    -- avg(left_capacity_check + right_capacity_check) AS `次均吸奶量(ml)`,
    -- sum((left_capacity_check + right_capacity_check)) / COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS `人均吸奶量(ml)`,

    -- 次均操作时长（0值不计算）
    AVG(IF(operate_duration_check > 0, operate_duration_check, NULL))/60 AS `次均操作时长(分钟)(仅统计有时长的记录)`
from 
	dwd_usr_breast_suck_record_di
where 
	ds >= '2026-01-01' and to_date(operate_time) >= '2026-01-01'
	and (left_capacity_check > 0 or right_capacity_check > 0)
	and (email NOT LIKE "%rootglobal.net" or email is null)
	and source IN (2)
group by 
	日期--,日期1
order by 日期 desc",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 社区曝光sql
assets.businessDomain: 正彬 李的个人集合
tags: 正彬 李的个人集合
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
from_unixtime(cast(createtime / 1000 as bigint)) AS create_time
,from_unixtime(cast(writetime / 1000 as bigint)) AS create_time222

,get_json_object(content, '$.time')  AS os_t
,from_unixtime(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.time') / 1000 as bigint)) AS create_time2
,from_unixtime(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') / 1000 as bigint)) AS eventTime

,createtime/ 1000 - get_json_object(content, '$.time')/ 1000  as delta
,*
from 
dwd_tp_app_log_di
where traceid='4d86dbad-31a0-4470-9f72-64f143b88502'
and eventname='Page Visit'
order by delta asc
limit 2333



select 
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.bannerImage') AS bannerImage,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.bannerType') AS bannerType,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.id') AS bannerId,count(*) d
from 
dwd_tp_app_log_di 
where dt='2026-05-09' and
get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') =11900002
group by 
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.bannerImage'),
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.bannerType') ,
    get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.id')
order by d desc"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器售卖数_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT 
    str_to_date(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS 日期,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'M9吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) AS M9吸奶器销售量,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'M5 Smart吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) AS `M5 Smart吸奶器销售量`,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'Air 1吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) AS Air1吸奶器销售量,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'M10 吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) AS M10吸奶器销售量,
    
    -- 计算每天的总销售量
    SUM(order_device_cn) AS 总销售量,
    
    -- 计算各个型号的销售占比（保留4位小数，不乘以100）
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'M9吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(order_device_cn), 0), 6) AS M9销量占比,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'M5 Smart吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(order_device_cn), 0), 6) AS `M5 Smart销量占比`,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'Air 1吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(order_device_cn), 0), 6) AS Air1销量占比,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category_name_level5 = 'M10 吸奶器' THEN order_device_cn ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(order_device_cn), 0), 6) AS M10销量占比
    
FROM ads_user_device_stat_info_df 
WHERE category_name_level5 IN ('M9吸奶器', 'M5 Smart吸奶器', 'Air 1吸奶器', 'M10 吸奶器')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 近90天活跃用户生命周期内使用多款吸奶器的比例_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT 
    -- M9 用户仅用一种吸奶器比例
    1-SUM(CASE WHEN is_m9 = 1 AND bind_model_num = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_m9) AS m9用户绑定多种吸奶器比例,
    
    -- M5P0 用户仅用一种吸奶器比例
    1-SUM(CASE WHEN is_m5p0 = 1 AND bind_model_num = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_m5p0) AS m5p0用户绑定多种吸奶器比例,
    
    -- Air1 用户仅用一种吸奶器比例
    1-SUM(CASE WHEN is_air1 = 1 AND bind_model_num = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_air1) AS air1用户绑定多种吸奶器比例,
    
    -- W1 用户仅用一种吸奶器比例
    1-SUM(CASE WHEN is_w1 = 1 AND bind_model_num = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_w1) AS m10用户绑定多种吸奶器比例,


    SUM(CASE WHEN bind_model != 'M9' and is_m9 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_m9) AS m9用户绑定多种设备比例,
	SUM(CASE WHEN bind_model != 'M5P0' and is_m5p0 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_m5p0) AS m5p0用户绑定多种设备比例,
	SUM(CASE WHEN bind_model != 'Air1' and is_air1 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_air1) AS air1用户绑定多种设备比例,
	SUM(CASE WHEN bind_model != 'W1' and is_w1 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(is_w1) AS m10用户绑定多种设备比例
    



FROM (
    SELECT 
        uid,
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%M9%', 1, 0) AS is_m9,
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%', 1, 0) AS is_m5p0,
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%Air1%', 1, 0) AS is_air1,
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%W1%', 1, 0) AS is_w1,
        -- 补全逻辑：将各个型号的标识相加，得到每个用户绑定的设备型号种类数
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%M9%', 1, 0) + 
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%', 1, 0) + 
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%Air1%', 1, 0) + 
        IF(bind_model LIKE '%W1%', 1, 0) AS bind_model_num,
		bind_model
    FROM 
        dws_app_user_tag_info_df
    WHERE 
        --(bind_model LIKE '%M9%' OR bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%' OR bind_model LIKE '%Air1%' OR bind_model LIKE '%W1%')
        app_last_act_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
) t;

",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}
