assets.title: 近90天活跃用户注册时间与吸奶器绑定时间相差天数_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH base_data AS (
    SELECT 
        x.uid,
        x.app_active_date,
        -- 计算 绑定日期 - 活跃日期
        DATEDIFF(y.m9_bind_date, x.app_active_date) AS m9_diff_days,
        DATEDIFF(y.m5p0_bind_date, x.app_active_date) AS m5p0_diff_days,
        DATEDIFF(y.air1_bind_date, x.app_active_date) AS air1_diff_days,
        DATEDIFF(y.w1_bind_date, x.app_active_date) AS w1_diff_days
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            uid,
            app_active_date
        FROM 
            dws_app_user_tag_info_df
        WHERE 
            (bind_model LIKE '%M9%' OR bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%' OR bind_model LIKE '%Air1%' OR bind_model LIKE '%W1%')
            AND app_last_act_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    ) x 
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT 
            uid,
            TO_DATE(MIN(IF(model = 'M9', dev_create_time, NULL))) AS m9_bind_date,
            TO_DATE(MIN(IF(model = 'M5P0', dev_create_time, NULL))) AS m5p0_bind_date,
            TO_DATE(MIN(IF(model = 'Air1', dev_create_time, NULL))) AS air1_bind_date,
            TO_DATE(MIN(IF(model = 'W1', dev_create_time, NULL))) AS w1_bind_date
        FROM 
            dwd_app_device_binding_info
        WHERE 
            status = 1
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ) y ON x.uid = y.uid
)

SELECT 
    型号,
    用户数,
    注册与绑定平均间隔天数,
    -- 新增指标：注册30天以上才绑定的比例
    CONCAT(ROUND(注册30天以上用户数 / 用户数 * 100, 2), '%') AS 注册30天以上绑定比例
FROM (
    SELECT 
        'M9' AS 型号, 
        COUNT(m9_diff_days) AS 用户数, 
        ROUND(AVG(m9_diff_days), 2) AS 注册与绑定平均间隔天数,
        SUM(CASE WHEN m9_diff_days > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 注册30天以上用户数
    FROM base_data
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'M5P0' AS 型号, 
        COUNT(m5p0_diff_days) AS 用户数, 
        ROUND(AVG(m5p0_diff_days), 2) AS 注册与绑定平均间隔天数,
        SUM(CASE WHEN m5p0_diff_days > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 注册30天以上用户数
    FROM base_data
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'Air1' AS 型号, 
        COUNT(air1_diff_days) AS 用户数, 
        ROUND(AVG(air1_diff_days), 2) AS 注册与绑定平均间隔天数,
        SUM(CASE WHEN air1_diff_days > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 注册30天以上用户数
    FROM base_data
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'M10' AS 型号, 
        COUNT(w1_diff_days) AS 用户数, 
        ROUND(AVG(w1_diff_days), 2) AS 注册与绑定平均间隔天数,
        SUM(CASE WHEN w1_diff_days > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 注册30天以上用户数
    FROM base_data
) x 
ORDER BY 用户数 DESC;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器用户生命周期
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select date_format(app_last_act_date, '%Y%m') 年月,
avg(if(app_last_act_date>'2025-12-31' and bind_model not like '%M5P0%',datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date),null))  中高端吸奶器用户生命周期,
avg(if(app_last_act_date>'2025-12-31' and bind_model  like '%M5P0%',datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date),null)) 入门吸奶器用户生命周期,
avg(if(app_last_act_date>'2025-12-31' and bind_model not like '%M5P0%',datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date),null)) *0.8 +avg(if(app_last_act_date>'2025-12-31' and bind_model  like '%M5P0%',datediff(app_last_act_date,app_first_act_date),null)) *0.2  吸奶器用户综合生命周期
from dws_app_user_tag_info_df
where (bind_model  like '%M9%' or bind_model like '%Air1%' or bind_model like 'M5P0' or bind_model like '%W1%')
	and app_last_act_date>='2026-01-01' and app_last_act_date <= '2026-05-06'
group by 1
order by 1

",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

{

    {
      "native": "SELECT
   --get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.banner.bannerImage') AS bannerImage,
---eventname,count(*) d 
----dt,count(*) d,count(distinct uid) uids
*
FROM
dwd_tp_app_pump_log_di
where eventname='pump_manual_adjust_evt' and get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtType') ='pump_mode'
--group by eventname 
--order by d desc


SELECT
 get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtType') d,count(*)
----dt,count(*) d,count(distinct uid) uids

FROM
dwd_tp_app_pump_log_di
where eventname='pump_user_evt' --and evtType<>''
group by d
order by d desc



SELECT
dt
,uid
,writetime
,from_unixtime(cast( writetime/ 1000 as bigint))  writetime2

,dt
,createtime
,from_unixtime(cast( createtime/ 1000 as bigint))  createtime2

,content
,extradata

 ,get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS eventTime
 ,from_unixtime(cast( get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') / 1000 as bigint)) eventTime2
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.deviceId') AS deviceId
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS eventSessionId
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.os') AS os
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.timezoneOffset') AS timezoneOffset
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtType') AS evtType
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtTimestamp') AS evtTimestamp
,concat(
    from_unixtime(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtTimestamp') / 1000 as bigint)),
    '.',
    lpad(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtTimestamp') % 1000 as string),3,'0')
) as evtTimestamp2
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.useSessionId') AS useSessionId
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.deviceCode') AS deviceCode
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtSource') AS evtSource
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.adjustFrom') AS adjustFrom
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.adjustTo') AS adjustTo

FROM
dwd_tp_app_pump_log_di
where --eventname='pump_manual_adjust_evt'
---get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtType') <>'' and uid='2043279622633693628' and useSessionId='1360068673'
 get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtType')='vibration_level'

order by  eventTime desc


============
with t1 as (
SELECT
dt
,uid
,writetime
,from_unixtime(cast( writetime/ 1000 as bigint))  writetime2

,dt
,createtime
,from_unixtime(cast( createtime/ 1000 as bigint))  createtime2

,content
,extradata
,eventname
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtType') AS evtType
  
,concat(
    from_unixtime(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtTimestamp') / 1000 as bigint)),
    '.',
    lpad(cast(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtTimestamp') % 1000 as string),3,'0')
) as evtTimestamp2
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.useSessionId') AS useSessionId
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS eventTime
 ,from_unixtime(cast( get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') / 1000 as bigint)) eventTime2
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.deviceId') AS deviceId
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS eventSessionId
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.os') AS os
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.timezoneOffset') AS timezoneOffset


 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.deviceCode') AS deviceCode
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.evtSource') AS evtSource
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.adjustFrom') AS adjustFrom
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.adjustTo') AS adjustTo
 ,get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.finalVolumeMl') AS finalVolumeMl

FROM
dwd_tp_app_pump_log_di
where 
eventname='pump_session_end'
--uid ='2035478571531531165' 
order by eventTime asc
)
SELECT finalVolumeMl,count(*)
from t1 
group by finalVolumeMl



SElect * from dwd_sale_channel_order_detail limit 23",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 瑜伽球购买兑换报表
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "with order_info as (
select order_date, 
count(case when sku_code = 'YG010-PK70000N00101' then order_id end) k1,
count(case when sku_code = 'YG010-NR70000N00101' then order_id end) k2,
count(case when sku_code = 'YG010-GE70000N00101' then order_id end) k3,
count(case when sku_code = 'YG011-NA00000N00101' then order_id end) k4
from dwd_sale_channel_order_detail where order_date >='2025-01-01'
and sku_code in ('YG010-PK70000N00101', 'YG010-NR70000N00101', 'YG010-GE70000N00101', 'YG011-NA00000N00101')
group by order_date
),
course_info as (
select date(redeem_time) rt, 
count(distinct case when source = 0 then id end) k5,
count(distinct case when source in (1, 2) then id end) k6
from dwd_usr_t_user_course_df where date(redeem_time) >='2025-01-01' and receive_status = 2
group by date(redeem_time)
)
select order_date '日期', 
        t1.k1 '粉球+粉圈购买数',
        t1.k2 '粉球+蓝圈购买数',
        t1.k3 '蓝球+蓝圈购买数',
		t1.k1+t1.k2+t1.k3 '瑜伽球购买数',
        t1.k4 '纯瑜伽课SPU（不带球）购买数',
        t2.k5 '瑜伽球兑换课程数',
        t2.k6 '购买或订单兑换课程数'
from order_info t1
left join 
course_info t2
on t1.order_date = t2.rt"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 连接耗时：连接成功的过程
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    ---dt AS `日期`,
	FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS `日期`,
	FROM_UNIXTIME(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')/1000) 事件触发时间,
	get_json_object(content,'$.appVersion') appversion,
    uid AS `用户ID`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS `os`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.model') AS `手机型号`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.brand') AS `手机品牌`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.timezoneOffset') AS `时区`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.languageCode') AS `语言`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') AS `来源页`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') AS `绑定设备数`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_flow_sub_id') AS `配网子链路`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') AS `连接网络`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS `设备类型`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_type') AS `连接类型`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.error_info') AS `失败原因`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') AS device_unique_id,
	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') AS `是否来自自动发现卡片`,


    -- 耗时：毫秒转秒，保留2位小数
    if(get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration')<0,0,get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration')) / 1000 AS `耗时(秒)`,

	CASE 
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN '连接成功'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'interrupt' THEN '手动中断退出'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'connect_fail' THEN '连接失败'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'interact_fail' THEN '交互失败'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'report_fail' THEN '接口失败'
		
	    ELSE '其他' 
	END AS 配网结果
FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di    --select * from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
WHERE
    dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
    AND dt >= '2026-03-27'
    AND elementid IN ('31800002')
    AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData') IS NOT NULL
    AND uid IS NOT NULL

"
    }
  ]
}

    {
      "native": "SELECT
t1.event_date,count(distinct t1.uid) as APP日活跃数

FROM
dwd_app_user_flag_info t1

dws_app_user_tag_info_df t2 
on t1.uid=t2.uid
where t1.act_flag=1 and t2.bind_model like '%BM08%' and t1.event_date>'2026-04-01'
group by  t1.event_date
order by event_date desc 
",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 连网漏斗-_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH exposure_events AS (
    -- 2. 锁定 31800008，并严格执行您的三选一过滤规则
    SELECT 
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt, 
        uid, 
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS exposure_time, 
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS eventSessionId
    FROM dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800008' -- 🛠️ 精修：修正为标准解析表达式
       AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
	  and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
),
upstream_events AS (--将设备量列表点击和扫码事件归拢，方便引导页关联来归因来源
    SELECT 
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt, uid,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS upstream_time,
        COALESCE(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.model'),get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device'),get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model')) AS raw_model,
        if(elementid='11300002','click','scan') AS src_type 
    FROM dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE elementid in ( '11300002','31800006') AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
		and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
),
joined_attribution AS ( --引导页与列表页点击&扫码页关联
    -- 3. 混合渠道关联
    SELECT 
        e.dt, e.uid, u.src_type, e.eventSessionId, e.exposure_time,
        IF(u.src_type = 'scan' AND u.raw_model IS NULL, '扫码未传型号', u.raw_model) AS raw_model,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY e.uid, e.exposure_time 
            ORDER BY u.upstream_time DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM 
        exposure_events e
    LEFT JOIN 
        upstream_events u ON e.uid = u.uid
        AND u.upstream_time <= e.exposure_time
        AND (e.exposure_time - u.upstream_time) <= IF(u.src_type = 'click', 300000, 1800000)
        AND u.dt = e.dt
)
,
all_scenarios AS ( --利用时间最近归因
    -- 4. 全字段严格对齐合并
    SELECT 
        dt, exposure_time, '手动场景' AS `设备连接场景`, raw_model AS `设备型号`, uid, src_type, eventSessionId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER () r
    FROM joined_attribution
    WHERE rn = 1 
)
,
exp_pv as 
	(select dt,设备型号,src_type 触发子渠道,       
		CASE 
	            WHEN src_type = 'scan' THEN 'BLE' 
	            WHEN 设备型号 IN ('WN02', 'WN05', 'WN05S', 'WN02S', 'WN02X', 'WN08', 'BM08','BM04') THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
	            WHEN 设备型号 IN ('W1', 'M5P0', 'Air1', 'M9', 'T31', 'V300', 'V3Pro', 'G100','V3') THEN 'BLE'
	            ELSE 'unknow' 
	        END AS `连接方式`,
		count(1) 曝光
	from all_scenarios
	where src_type is not null
	group by 1,2,3,4),


connect_start_events AS ( --开始连接上场
    -- 5. 单独清洗 31800001 开始连接事件
    SELECT 
        uid,
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS connect_time,
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS connect_session_id,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS conn_model,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') AS conn_device_id, 
        content,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000))) r_c 
    FROM dwd_tp_iot_log_di
    WHERE get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
		and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
)


,
attributed_funnel AS (
    -- 6. 双轨制归因关联层
    SELECT 
        a.*, 
        c.uid uid_c, r_c, c.dt dt_start_connect,c.content,
        c.connect_time, c.connect_session_id, c.conn_model, 
        c.conn_device_id, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY c.uid, c.connect_time,c.dt, r_c
            ORDER BY (c.connect_time - a.exposure_time) ASC
        ) AS conn_rn
    FROM connect_start_events c 
    LEFT JOIN all_scenarios a ON a.uid = c.uid 
        AND a.eventSessionId = connect_session_id
        AND a.exposure_time <= c.connect_time
        AND (c.connect_time - a.exposure_time) <= 600000
        AND a.dt = c.dt
        AND IF(
            a.`设备型号` IS  NULL OR a.`设备型号` = '' OR a.`设备型号` = '扫码未传型号', TRUE,
            a.`设备型号` = c.conn_model
        )
)
,


downstream_events_pool AS ( 
    SELECT 
        uid,
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt,
        if(elementid = '31800013','12600014',elementid) AS element_id,
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS session_id,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS event_time,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') AS connect_result,
        null conn_model,
		null from_page_id,
		null is_auto_discovery_card,
		null device_connection_type,
		null src_type,
		content
    FROM 
        dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE 
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN ('12600014', '31800010', '31800002') 
         OR (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800014' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.provision_state') = 'cloud_connecting' AND get_json_object(content, '$.os') = 'IOS')
		 OR (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800014' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_state') = 'route_connecting' AND get_json_object(content, '$.os') = 'android' and get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success')
		 or (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800013' AND get_json_object(content, '$.os') = 'android') )
        AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21) 
        and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21) -- 🛠️ 补全了右括号

    UNION ALL 

    -- 🌟 终极补全：将 31800001 行为数据 1:1 对齐合流进池
    SELECT 
        uid_c AS uid,                                   -- 1. 用户ID
        dt_start_connect AS dt,                         -- 2. 触发日期
        '31800001' AS element_id,                       -- 3. 固化事件ID为 31800001
        connect_session_id AS session_id,               -- 4. 会话ID
        connect_time AS event_time,                     -- 5. 13位毫秒时间戳
        CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS connect_result,         -- 6. 结果占位（开始连接时无结果，置为空）
        conn_model   ,          
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') from_page_id,
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') is_auto_discovery_card,
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') device_connection_type,
		src_type,
		content
    FROM 
        attributed_funnel
    WHERE 
        conn_rn = 1                                     -- 🎯 严格锁定归因成功的唯一主线记录
),



grouped_events AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        -- 💡 动态切片：同一用户下，每遇到一次 31800001 计数器加 1，后续事件累加 0 保持不变
        -- 排序加入了 element_id 权重控制，确保当时间戳极其偶发一致时，31800001 优先起跑开组
        SUM(CASE WHEN element_id = '31800001' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY uid
            ORDER BY event_time ASC, CASE WHEN element_id = '31800001' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS block_id
    FROM
        downstream_events_pool
),

-- ===================================================================
-- 🛠️ 步骤二：在同一个分组块 (block_id) 内部，利用 MAX() 将四大属性强行广播给所有人
-- ===================================================================
final_broadcast_events AS (
    SELECT
        uid,
        min(dt) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) as dt,--避免跨天数据，一组事件如果跨天则归一到一起去
        element_id,
        session_id,
        event_time,
        connect_result,
        block_id AS rc, -- 🎯 对齐你要求的输出字段名：rc
        
        -- 💥 核心填充逻辑：组内只有 31800001 有值，其余为 NULL。通过 MAX() 瞬间前向覆盖所有人
        MAX(conn_model) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS conn_model,
        MAX(from_page_id) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS from_page_id,
        MAX(is_auto_discovery_card) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS is_auto_discovery_card,
        MAX(device_connection_type) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS device_connection_type,
		MAX(src_type) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS src_type,
		
        
        content
    FROM
        grouped_events
),
pivoted_summary AS (
    SELECT
        dt,
        -- 🛠️ 核心修正：全部弃用 get_json_object，直接读取广播好的高价值明细列
        CASE 
            WHEN src_type IS NOT NULL THEN src_type
            WHEN lower(is_auto_discovery_card) = 'true' THEN '自动卡片'
            WHEN from_page_id IN ('add_device_list','page_device_list') THEN '设备列表页内嵌卡片'
            WHEN from_page_id IN ('add_device_page') THEN 'click'
            ELSE '未知' 
        END AS `触发子渠道`,
        CASE 
            
            WHEN conn_model IN ('WN02', 'WN05', 'WN05S', 'WN02S', 'WN02X', 'WN08', 'BM08','BM04') THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
            WHEN conn_model IN ('W1', 'M5P0', 'Air1', 'M9', 'T31', 'V300', 'V3Pro', 'G100','V3') THEN 'BLE'
			WHEN src_type = 'scan' THEN 'BLE' 
            WHEN conn_model = 'MeggO' THEN 'BLE (待确认)' 
            WHEN device_connection_type = 'wifi' THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
            WHEN device_connection_type = 'ble' THEN 'BLE'
            ELSE 'BLE' 
        END AS `连接方式`,
        conn_model,
        
        -- 🎯 完美承接你的高精颗粒度去重去重口径：每个 uid + rc 代表一次绝对独立的配网会话行为
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800001', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800001_连接发起pv数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '12600014', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800010', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800010_进入连接程序session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800014', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800014_路由通讯成功session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800002', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800002_连接结束总session数`,
        
        -- 🎯 追加衍生业务指标：31800002 成功去重 Session 数
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800002' AND (connect_result = 'success' OR connect_result = '1'), CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800002_成功session数`
    FROM
        final_broadcast_events
    GROUP BY
        1, 2, 3, 4
)


-- select * from pivoted_summary


SELECT 
    -- 🛠️ 修正：y.日期 -> y.dt
    COALESCE(x.dt, y.dt) AS `日期`,
    -- 🛠️ 修正：y.设备型号 -> y.conn_model
    COALESCE(x.设备型号, y.conn_model) AS `设备型号`,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) IN ('设备列表页内嵌卡片','自动卡片') THEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`)
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) = 'click' THEN '点击设备列表设备' 
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) = 'scan' THEN '扫码' 
        ELSE COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) 
    END AS `触发子渠道`,
    
    COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) AS `连接方式`,
    
    -- 💥 核心整改点：曝光如果小于 31800001pv数 或者 曝光为空，则曝光 = 31800001pv数
    IF(
        x.曝光 IS NULL OR x.曝光 < COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0), 
        COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0), 
        x.曝光
    ) AS `曝光pv`,
    
    COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0) AS `31800001_连接发起pv数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑一：12600014 session数
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0)
    ) AS `12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`,
    
    COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) AS `31800010_进入连接程序session数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑二：31800014 路由通讯成功
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`31800014_路由通讯成功session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0)
    ) AS `31800014_路由通讯成功session数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑三：31800002 连接结束总数
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0)
    ) AS `31800002_连接结束总session数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑四：31800002 成功数防负数拦截
    IF(
        IF(
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
            AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
            COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) - COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) + COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0), 
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0)
        ) < 0, 
        0,
        IF(
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
            AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
            COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) - COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) + COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0), 
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0)
        )
    ) AS `31800002_成功session数`

FROM 
    exp_pv x 
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    -- 🛠️ 修正：ON 条件中的 y.日期 -> y.dt， y.设备型号 -> y.conn_model
    pivoted_summary y ON x.dt = y.dt 
    AND x.设备型号 = y.conn_model 
    AND x.触发子渠道 = y.`触发子渠道` 
    AND x.连接方式 = y.`连接方式`
ORDER BY 
    1 DESC, 2 ASC, 4 ASC, 5 ASC;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 不同入口连接1_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH exposure_events AS (
    -- 2. 锁定 31800008，并严格执行您的三选一过滤规则
    SELECT 
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt, 
        uid, 
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS exposure_time, 
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS eventSessionId
    FROM dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800008' -- 🛠️ 精修：修正为标准解析表达式
       AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
	  and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
),
upstream_events AS (--将设备量列表点击和扫码事件归拢，方便引导页关联来归因来源
    SELECT 
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt, uid,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS upstream_time,
        COALESCE(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.model'),get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device'),get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model')) AS raw_model,
        if(elementid='11300002','click','scan') AS src_type 
    FROM dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE elementid in ( '11300002','31800006') AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
		and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
),
joined_attribution AS ( --引导页与列表页点击&扫码页关联
    -- 3. 混合渠道关联
    SELECT 
        e.dt, e.uid, u.src_type, e.eventSessionId, e.exposure_time,
        IF(u.src_type = 'scan' AND u.raw_model IS NULL, '扫码未传型号', u.raw_model) AS raw_model,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY e.uid, e.exposure_time 
            ORDER BY u.upstream_time DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM 
        exposure_events e
    LEFT JOIN 
        upstream_events u ON e.uid = u.uid
        AND u.upstream_time <= e.exposure_time
        AND (e.exposure_time - u.upstream_time) <= IF(u.src_type = 'click', 300000, 1800000)
        AND u.dt = e.dt
)
,
all_scenarios AS ( --利用时间最近归因
    -- 4. 全字段严格对齐合并
    SELECT 
        dt, exposure_time, '手动场景' AS `设备连接场景`, raw_model AS `设备型号`, uid, src_type, eventSessionId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER () r
    FROM joined_attribution
    WHERE rn = 1 
)
,
exp_pv as 
	(select dt,设备型号,src_type 触发子渠道,       
		CASE 
	            WHEN src_type = 'scan' THEN 'BLE' 
	            WHEN 设备型号 IN ('WN02', 'WN05', 'WN05S', 'WN02S', 'WN02X', 'WN08', 'BM08','BM04') THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
	            WHEN 设备型号 IN ('W1', 'M5P0', 'Air1', 'M9', 'T31', 'V300', 'V3Pro', 'G100','V3') THEN 'BLE'
	            ELSE 'unknow' 
	        END AS `连接方式`,
		count(1) 曝光
	from all_scenarios
	where src_type is not null
	group by 1,2,3,4),


connect_start_events AS ( --开始连接上场
    -- 5. 单独清洗 31800001 开始连接事件
    SELECT 
        uid,
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS connect_time,
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS connect_session_id,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS conn_model,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') AS conn_device_id, 
        content,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000))) r_c 
    FROM dwd_tp_iot_log_di
    WHERE get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
		and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
)


,
attributed_funnel AS (
    -- 6. 双轨制归因关联层
    SELECT 
        a.*, 
        c.uid uid_c, r_c, c.dt dt_start_connect,c.content,
        c.connect_time, c.connect_session_id, c.conn_model, 
        c.conn_device_id, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY c.uid, c.connect_time,c.dt, r_c
            ORDER BY (c.connect_time - a.exposure_time) ASC
        ) AS conn_rn
    FROM connect_start_events c 
    LEFT JOIN all_scenarios a ON a.uid = c.uid 
        AND a.eventSessionId = connect_session_id
        AND a.exposure_time <= c.connect_time
        AND (c.connect_time - a.exposure_time) <= 600000
        AND a.dt = c.dt
        AND IF(
            a.`设备型号` IS  NULL OR a.`设备型号` = '' OR a.`设备型号` = '扫码未传型号', TRUE,
            a.`设备型号` = c.conn_model
        )
)
,


downstream_events_pool AS ( 
    SELECT 
        uid,
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt,
        get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') AS element_id,
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS session_id,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS event_time,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') AS connect_result,
        null conn_model,
		null from_page_id,
		null is_auto_discovery_card,
		null device_connection_type,
		null src_type,
		content
    FROM 
        dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE 
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN ('12600014', '31800010', '31800002') 
         OR (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800014' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.provision_state') = 'route_connecting'))
        AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21) 
        and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21) -- 🛠️ 补全了右括号

    UNION ALL 

    -- 🌟 终极补全：将 31800001 行为数据 1:1 对齐合流进池
    SELECT 
        uid_c AS uid,                                   -- 1. 用户ID
        dt_start_connect AS dt,                         -- 2. 触发日期
        '31800001' AS element_id,                       -- 3. 固化事件ID为 31800001
        connect_session_id AS session_id,               -- 4. 会话ID
        connect_time AS event_time,                     -- 5. 13位毫秒时间戳
        CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS connect_result,         -- 6. 结果占位（开始连接时无结果，置为空）
        conn_model   ,          
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') from_page_id,
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') is_auto_discovery_card,
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') device_connection_type,
		src_type,
		content
    FROM 
        attributed_funnel
    WHERE 
        conn_rn = 1                                     -- 🎯 严格锁定归因成功的唯一主线记录
),



grouped_events AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        -- 💡 动态切片：同一用户下，每遇到一次 31800001 计数器加 1，后续事件累加 0 保持不变
        -- 排序加入了 element_id 权重控制，确保当时间戳极其偶发一致时，31800001 优先起跑开组
        SUM(CASE WHEN element_id = '31800001' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY uid
            ORDER BY event_time ASC, CASE WHEN element_id = '31800001' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS block_id
    FROM
        downstream_events_pool
),

-- ===================================================================
-- 🛠️ 步骤二：在同一个分组块 (block_id) 内部，利用 MAX() 将四大属性强行广播给所有人
-- ===================================================================
final_broadcast_events AS (
    SELECT
        uid,
        dt,
        element_id,
        session_id,
        event_time,
        connect_result,
        block_id AS rc, -- 🎯 对齐你要求的输出字段名：rc
        
        -- 💥 核心填充逻辑：组内只有 31800001 有值，其余为 NULL。通过 MAX() 瞬间前向覆盖所有人
        MAX(conn_model) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS conn_model,
        MAX(from_page_id) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS from_page_id,
        MAX(is_auto_discovery_card) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS is_auto_discovery_card,
        MAX(device_connection_type) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS device_connection_type,
		MAX(src_type) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS src_type,
		
        
        content
    FROM
        grouped_events
),
pivoted_summary AS (
    SELECT
        dt,
        -- 🛠️ 核心修正：全部弃用 get_json_object，直接读取广播好的高价值明细列
        CASE 
            WHEN src_type IS NOT NULL THEN src_type
            WHEN lower(is_auto_discovery_card) = 'true' THEN '自动卡片'
            WHEN from_page_id IN ('add_device_list','page_device_list') THEN '设备列表页内嵌卡片'
            WHEN from_page_id IN ('add_device_page') THEN 'click'
            ELSE '未知' 
        END AS `触发子渠道`,
        CASE 
            WHEN src_type = 'scan' THEN 'BLE' 
            WHEN conn_model IN ('WN02', 'WN05', 'WN05S', 'WN02S', 'WN02X', 'WN08', 'BM08','BM04') THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
            WHEN conn_model IN ('W1', 'M5P0', 'Air1', 'M9', 'T31', 'V300', 'V3Pro', 'G100','V3') THEN 'BLE'
            WHEN conn_model = 'MeggO' THEN 'BLE (待确认)' 
            WHEN device_connection_type = 'wifi' THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
            WHEN device_connection_type = 'ble' THEN 'BLE'
            ELSE 'BLE' 
        END AS `连接方式`,
        conn_model,
        
        -- 🎯 完美承接你的高精颗粒度去重去重口径：每个 uid + rc 代表一次绝对独立的配网会话行为
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800001', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800001_连接发起pv数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '12600014', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800010', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800010_进入连接程序session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800014', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800014_路由通讯成功session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800002', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800002_连接结束总session数`,
        
        -- 🎯 追加衍生业务指标：31800002 成功去重 Session 数
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800002' AND (connect_result = 'success' OR connect_result = '1'), CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800002_成功session数`
    FROM
        final_broadcast_events
    GROUP BY
        1, 2, 3, 4
)


-- select * from pivoted_summary


SELECT 
    -- 🛠️ 修正：y.日期 -> y.dt
    COALESCE(x.dt, y.dt) AS `日期`,
    -- 🛠️ 修正：y.设备型号 -> y.conn_model
    COALESCE(x.设备型号, y.conn_model) AS `设备型号`,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) IN ('设备列表页内嵌卡片','自动卡片') THEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`)
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) = 'click' THEN '点击设备列表设备' 
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) = 'scan' THEN '扫码' 
        ELSE COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) 
    END AS `触发子渠道`,
    
    COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) AS `连接方式`,
    
    -- 💥 核心整改点：曝光如果小于 31800001pv数 或者 曝光为空，则曝光 = 31800001pv数
    IF(
        x.曝光 IS NULL OR x.曝光 < COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0), 
        COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0), 
        x.曝光
    ) AS `曝光pv`,
    
    COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0) AS `31800001_连接发起pv数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑一：12600014 session数
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0)
    ) AS `12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`,
    
    COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) AS `31800010_进入连接程序session数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑二：31800014 路由通讯成功
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`31800014_路由通讯成功session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0)
    ) AS `31800014_路由通讯成功session数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑三：31800002 连接结束总数
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0)
    ) AS `31800002_连接结束总session数`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑四：31800002 成功数防负数拦截
    IF(
        IF(
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
            AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
            COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) - COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) + COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0), 
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0)
        ) < 0, 
        0,
        IF(
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
            AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
            COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) - COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) + COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0), 
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0)
        )
    ) AS `31800002_成功session数`

FROM 
    exp_pv x 
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    -- 🛠️ 修正：ON 条件中的 y.日期 -> y.dt， y.设备型号 -> y.conn_model
    pivoted_summary y ON x.dt = y.dt 
    AND x.设备型号 = y.conn_model 
    AND x.触发子渠道 = y.`触发子渠道` 
    AND x.连接方式 = y.`连接方式`
ORDER BY 
    1 DESC, 2 ASC, 4 ASC, 5 ASC"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 设备连接漏斗形式数据_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH exposure_events AS (
    -- 2. 锁定 31800008，并严格执行您的三选一过滤规则
    SELECT 
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt, 
        uid, 
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS exposure_time, 
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS eventSessionId
    FROM dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800008' -- 🛠️ 精修：修正为标准解析表达式
       AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
	  and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
),
upstream_events AS (--将设备量列表点击和扫码事件归拢，方便引导页关联来归因来源
    SELECT 
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt, uid,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS upstream_time,
        COALESCE(get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.model'),get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device'),get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model')) AS raw_model,
        if(elementid='11300002','click','scan') AS src_type 
    FROM dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE elementid in ( '11300002','31800006') AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
		and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
),
joined_attribution AS ( --引导页与列表页点击&扫码页关联
    -- 3. 混合渠道关联
    SELECT 
        e.dt, e.uid, u.src_type, e.eventSessionId, e.exposure_time,
        IF(u.src_type = 'scan' AND u.raw_model IS NULL, '扫码未传型号', u.raw_model) AS raw_model,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY e.uid, e.exposure_time 
            ORDER BY u.upstream_time DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM 
        exposure_events e
    LEFT JOIN 
        upstream_events u ON e.uid = u.uid
        AND u.upstream_time <= e.exposure_time
        AND (e.exposure_time - u.upstream_time) <= IF(u.src_type = 'click', 300000, 1800000)
        AND u.dt = e.dt
)
,
all_scenarios AS ( --利用时间最近归因
    -- 4. 全字段严格对齐合并
    SELECT 
        dt, exposure_time, '手动场景' AS `设备连接场景`, raw_model AS `设备型号`, uid, src_type, eventSessionId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER () r
    FROM joined_attribution
    WHERE rn = 1 
)
,
exp_pv as 
	(select dt,设备型号,src_type 触发子渠道,       
		CASE 
	            WHEN src_type = 'scan' THEN 'BLE' 
	            WHEN 设备型号 IN ('WN02', 'WN05', 'WN05S', 'WN02S', 'WN02X', 'WN08', 'BM08','BM04') THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
	            WHEN 设备型号 IN ('W1', 'M5P0', 'Air1', 'M9', 'T31', 'V300', 'V3Pro', 'G100','V3') THEN 'BLE'
	            ELSE 'unknow' 
	        END AS `连接方式`,
		count(1) 曝光
	from all_scenarios
	where src_type is not null
	group by 1,2,3,4),


connect_start_events AS ( --开始连接上场
    -- 5. 单独清洗 31800001 开始连接事件
    SELECT 
        uid,
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS connect_time,
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS connect_session_id,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS conn_model,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') AS conn_device_id, 
        content,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000))) r_c 
    FROM dwd_tp_iot_log_di
    WHERE get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
		and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21)
)


,
attributed_funnel AS (
    -- 6. 双轨制归因关联层
    SELECT 
        a.*, 
        c.uid uid_c, r_c, c.dt dt_start_connect,c.content,
        c.connect_time, c.connect_session_id, c.conn_model, 
        c.conn_device_id, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY c.uid, c.connect_time,c.dt, r_c
            ORDER BY (c.connect_time - a.exposure_time) ASC
        ) AS conn_rn
    FROM connect_start_events c 
    LEFT JOIN all_scenarios a ON a.uid = c.uid 
        AND a.eventSessionId = connect_session_id
        AND a.exposure_time <= c.connect_time
        AND (c.connect_time - a.exposure_time) <= 600000
        AND a.dt = c.dt
        AND IF(
            a.`设备型号` IS  NULL OR a.`设备型号` = '' OR a.`设备型号` = '扫码未传型号', TRUE,
            a.`设备型号` = c.conn_model
        )
)
,


downstream_events_pool AS ( 
    SELECT 
        uid,
        to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) dt,
        if(elementid = '31800013','12600014',elementid) AS element_id,
        get_json_object(content, '$.eventSessionId') AS session_id,
        CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) AS event_time,
        get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') AS connect_result,
        null conn_model,
		null from_page_id,
		null is_auto_discovery_card,
		null device_connection_type,
		null src_type,
		content
    FROM 
        dwd_tp_connect_log_di
    WHERE 
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN ('12600014', '31800010', '31800002') 
        OR (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800014' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.provision_state') = 'cloud_connecting' AND get_json_object(content, '$.os') = 'IOS')
		 OR (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800014' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_state') = 'route_connecting' AND get_json_object(content, '$.os') = 'android' and get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success')
		 or (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800013' AND get_json_object(content, '$.os') = 'android') )
        AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 21) 
        and to_date(FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content, '$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000)) >= date_sub(current_date(), 21) -- 🛠️ 补全了右括号

    UNION ALL 

    -- 🌟 终极补全：将 31800001 行为数据 1:1 对齐合流进池
    SELECT 
        uid_c AS uid,                                   -- 1. 用户ID
        dt_start_connect AS dt,                         -- 2. 触发日期
        '31800001' AS element_id,                       -- 3. 固化事件ID为 31800001
        connect_session_id AS session_id,               -- 4. 会话ID
        connect_time AS event_time,                     -- 5. 13位毫秒时间戳
        CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS connect_result,         -- 6. 结果占位（开始连接时无结果，置为空）
        conn_model   ,          
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') from_page_id,
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') is_auto_discovery_card,
		get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') device_connection_type,
		src_type,
		content
    FROM 
        attributed_funnel
    WHERE 
        conn_rn = 1                                     -- 🎯 严格锁定归因成功的唯一主线记录
),



grouped_events AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        -- 💡 动态切片：同一用户下，每遇到一次 31800001 计数器加 1，后续事件累加 0 保持不变
        -- 排序加入了 element_id 权重控制，确保当时间戳极其偶发一致时，31800001 优先起跑开组
        SUM(CASE WHEN element_id = '31800001' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY uid
            ORDER BY event_time ASC, CASE WHEN element_id = '31800001' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS block_id
    FROM
        downstream_events_pool
),

-- ===================================================================
-- 🛠️ 步骤二：在同一个分组块 (block_id) 内部，利用 MAX() 将四大属性强行广播给所有人
-- ===================================================================
final_broadcast_events AS (
    SELECT
        uid,
        min(dt) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) as dt,--避免跨天数据，一组事件如果跨天则归一到一起去
        element_id,
        session_id,
        event_time,
        connect_result,
        block_id AS rc, -- 🎯 对齐你要求的输出字段名：rc
        
        -- 💥 核心填充逻辑：组内只有 31800001 有值，其余为 NULL。通过 MAX() 瞬间前向覆盖所有人
        MAX(conn_model) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS conn_model,
        MAX(from_page_id) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS from_page_id,
        MAX(is_auto_discovery_card) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS is_auto_discovery_card,
        MAX(device_connection_type) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS device_connection_type,
		MAX(src_type) OVER (PARTITION BY uid, block_id) AS src_type,
		
        
        content
    FROM
        grouped_events
),
pivoted_summary AS (
    SELECT
        dt,
        -- 🛠️ 核心修正：全部弃用 get_json_object，直接读取广播好的高价值明细列
        CASE 
            WHEN src_type IS NOT NULL THEN src_type
            WHEN lower(is_auto_discovery_card) = 'true' THEN '自动卡片'
            WHEN from_page_id IN ('add_device_list','page_device_list') THEN '设备列表页内嵌卡片'
            WHEN from_page_id IN ('add_device_page') THEN 'click'
            ELSE '未知' 
        END AS `触发子渠道`,
        CASE 
            
            WHEN conn_model IN ('WN02', 'WN05', 'WN05S', 'WN02S', 'WN02X', 'WN08', 'BM08','BM04') THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
            WHEN conn_model IN ('W1', 'M5P0', 'Air1', 'M9', 'T31', 'V300', 'V3Pro', 'G100','V3') THEN 'BLE'
			WHEN src_type = 'scan' THEN 'BLE' 
            WHEN conn_model = 'MeggO' THEN 'BLE (待确认)' 
            WHEN device_connection_type = 'wifi' THEN 'WiFi+BLE'
            WHEN device_connection_type = 'ble' THEN 'BLE'
            ELSE 'BLE' 
        END AS `连接方式`,
        conn_model,
        
        -- 🎯 完美承接你的高精颗粒度去重去重口径：每个 uid + rc 代表一次绝对独立的配网会话行为
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800001', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800001_连接发起pv数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '12600014', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800010', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800010_进入连接程序session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800014', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800014_路由通讯成功session数`,
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800002', CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800002_连接结束总session数`,
        
        -- 🎯 追加衍生业务指标：31800002 成功去重 Session 数
        COUNT(DISTINCT IF(element_id = '31800002' AND (connect_result = 'success' OR connect_result = '1'), CONCAT(uid, '_', rc), NULL)) AS `31800002_成功session数`
    FROM
        final_broadcast_events
    GROUP BY
        1, 2, 3, 4
),

-- select * from pivoted_summary

horizontal_res AS (
SELECT 
    -- 🛠️ 修正：y.日期 -> y.dt
    COALESCE(x.dt, y.dt) AS `日期`,
    -- 🛠️ 修正：y.设备型号 -> y.conn_model
    COALESCE(x.设备型号, y.conn_model) AS `设备型号`,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) IN ('设备列表页内嵌卡片','自动卡片') THEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`)
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) = 'click' THEN '点击设备列表设备' 
        WHEN COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) = 'scan' THEN '扫码' 
        ELSE COALESCE(x.触发子渠道, y.`触发子渠道`) 
    END AS `触发连接场景`,
    
    COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) AS `连接方式`,
    
    -- 💥 核心整改点：曝光如果小于 31800001pv数 或者 曝光为空，则曝光 = 31800001pv数
    IF(
        x.曝光 IS NULL OR x.曝光 < COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0), 
        COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0), 
        x.曝光
    ) AS `曝光`,
    
    COALESCE(y.`31800001_连接发起pv数`, 0) AS `点击连接`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑一：12600014 session数
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0)
    ) AS `提交WiFi密码`,
    -- COALESCE(y.`12600014_提交WiFi密码session数`, 0) AS `提交WiFi密码`,
    COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) AS `连接开始_wifi`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑二：31800014 路由通讯成功
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`31800014_路由通讯成功session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) < COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0)
    ) AS `路由通讯成功`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑三：31800002 连接结束总数
    IF(
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
        AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
        COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0),
        COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0)
    ) AS `连接开始_BLE`,
    
    -- 漏斗阶梯卡杀逻辑四：31800002 成功数防负数拦截
    IF(
        IF(
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
            AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
            COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) - COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) + COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0), 
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0)
        ) < 0, 
        0,
        IF(
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) > COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) 
            AND COALESCE(x.连接方式, y.`连接方式`) = 'WiFi+BLE',
            COALESCE(y.`31800010_进入连接程序session数`, 0) - COALESCE(y.`31800002_连接结束总session数`, 0) + COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0), 
            COALESCE(y.`31800002_成功session数`, 0)
        )
    ) AS `连接成功`

FROM 
    exp_pv x 
FULL OUTER JOIN 
    -- 🛠️ 修正：ON 条件中的 y.日期 -> y.dt， y.设备型号 -> y.conn_model
    pivoted_summary y ON x.dt = y.dt 
    AND x.设备型号 = y.conn_model 
    AND x.触发子渠道 = y.`触发子渠道` 
    AND x.连接方式 = y.`连接方式`
)

-- 在此基础上修改成：日期、设备型号、触发连接场景、连接方式、连接流程、VALUE
-- 连接流程的内容则是曝光、点击连接、提交wifi密码等



SELECT 
    h.`日期`,
    h.`设备型号`,
    h.`触发连接场景`,
    h.`连接方式`,
    s.`连接流程`,
    -- 根据生成的流动步骤，动态摘取对应的度量指标
    CASE s.`连接流程`
        WHEN '引导页or自动卡片曝光'         THEN h.`曝光`
        WHEN '点击连接'     THEN h.`点击连接`
        WHEN '提交WiFi密码'  THEN h.`提交WiFi密码`
        WHEN '连接开始_wifi' THEN h.`连接开始_wifi`
        WHEN '路由通讯成功'  THEN h.`路由通讯成功`
        WHEN '连接开始_BLE'  THEN h.`连接开始_BLE`
        WHEN '连接成功'     THEN h.`连接成功`
    END AS `VALUE`
FROM 
    horizontal_res h
CROSS JOIN (
    -- 建立纯内存虚拟管道映射表，生成 7 行标准的流程主键
    SELECT '引导页or自动卡片曝光' AS `连接流程` UNION ALL
    SELECT '点击连接' AS `连接流程` UNION ALL
    SELECT '提交WiFi密码' AS `连接流程` UNION ALL
    SELECT '连接开始_wifi' AS `连接流程` UNION ALL
    SELECT '路由通讯成功' AS `连接流程` UNION ALL
    SELECT '连接开始_BLE' AS `连接流程` UNION ALL
    SELECT '连接成功' AS `连接流程`
) s
ORDER BY 
    1 DESC, 2 ASC, 3 ASC, 4 ASC,
    -- 让流程输出天然具备业务漏斗递进的先后顺序（而不是变成无序字符串拼音排序）
    CASE s.`连接流程`
        WHEN '引导页or自动卡片曝光'         THEN 1
        WHEN '点击连接'     THEN 2
        WHEN '提交WiFi密码'  THEN 3
        WHEN '连接开始_wifi' THEN 4
        WHEN '路由通讯成功'  THEN 5
        WHEN '连接开始_BLE'  THEN 6
        WHEN '连接成功'     THEN 7
    END ASC;
"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q01 · 累计核心 KPI
assets.description: 总览Tab - 累计活跃用户数、设备数、吸奶次数、有效进程率、总时长等核心KPI
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    MAX(cumulative_users)    AS 累计活跃用户数,
    MAX(cumulative_devices)  AS 累计活跃设备数,
    SUM(total_sessions)      AS 总吸奶次数,
    ROUND(SUM(total_sessions) / NULLIF(SUM(dau), 0), 1)  AS 人均吸奶次数,
    ROUND(SUM(valid_sessions) / NULLIF(SUM(total_sessions), 0) * 100, 1) AS 有效进程率_pct,
    ROUND(SUM(total_duration_h), 0)  AS 总吸奶时长_小时,
    ROUND(SUM(total_duration_sec) / 60.0 / NULLIF(SUM(total_sessions), 0), 1) AS 次均时长_分钟,
    ROUND(MAX(cumulative_devices) / NULLIF(MAX(cumulative_users), 0), 2) AS 人均设备数
FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_daily_df
WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q11 · 新用户同期留存队列（近13周）
assets.description: 留存Tab - 新用户同期队列留存表（按激活周，近13周，D1/D3/D7/D14留存率）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH user_first AS (
    SELECT uid, MIN(evt_dt) AS install_date
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
    WHERE uid IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY uid
),
user_active AS (
    SELECT uid, evt_dt AS active_date
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
    WHERE uid IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY uid, evt_dt
),
week_base AS (
    SELECT uid, install_date,
        CAST(date_trunc('week', install_date) AS DATE) AS install_week
    FROM user_first
    WHERE install_date BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
)
SELECT
    w.install_week                                          AS 激活周,
    COUNT(DISTINCT w.uid)                                   AS 新增用户,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.active_date = DATE_ADD(w.install_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)  THEN w.uid END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT w.uid), 0) * 100, 1)       AS D1留存率_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.active_date = DATE_ADD(w.install_date, INTERVAL 3 DAY)  THEN w.uid END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT w.uid), 0) * 100, 1)       AS D3留存率_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.active_date = DATE_ADD(w.install_date, INTERVAL 7 DAY)  THEN w.uid END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT w.uid), 0) * 100, 1)       AS D7留存率_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.active_date = DATE_ADD(w.install_date, INTERVAL 14 DAY) THEN w.uid END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT w.uid), 0) * 100, 1)       AS D14留存率_pct
FROM week_base w
LEFT JOIN user_active a ON w.uid = a.uid
GROUP BY w.install_week
ORDER BY w.install_week DESC
LIMIT 13"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q12 · 连续活跃天数分布
assets.description: 留存Tab - 用户最长连续活跃天数分布柱状图
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH user_dates AS (
    SELECT uid, evt_dt AS active_date
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
    WHERE uid IS NOT NULL
      AND evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
    GROUP BY uid, evt_dt
),
numbered AS (
    SELECT uid, active_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY uid ORDER BY active_date) AS rn
    FROM user_dates
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT uid, active_date,
        DATE_SUB(active_date, INTERVAL rn DAY) AS grp_key
    FROM numbered
),
streak_len AS (
    SELECT uid, grp_key, COUNT(*) AS streak_days
    FROM grouped GROUP BY uid, grp_key
),
max_streak AS (
    SELECT uid, MAX(streak_days) AS max_consecutive_days
    FROM streak_len GROUP BY uid
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN max_consecutive_days = 1              THEN '1天'
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 2 AND 3  THEN '2-3天'
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 4 AND 7  THEN '4-7天'
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN '8-14天'
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 15 AND 30 THEN '15-30天'
        ELSE '30+天'
    END AS 连续活跃天数区间,
    CASE
        WHEN max_consecutive_days = 1 THEN 1
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 2 AND 3  THEN 2
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 4 AND 7  THEN 4
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 8 AND 14 THEN 8
        WHEN max_consecutive_days BETWEEN 15 AND 30 THEN 15
        ELSE 31
    END AS 排序,
    COUNT(uid)  AS 用户数,
    ROUND(COUNT(uid) / SUM(COUNT(uid)) OVER() * 100, 1) AS 占比_pct
FROM max_streak
GROUP BY 连续活跃天数区间, 排序
ORDER BY 排序"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q15 · 每日次数分布（用户日粒度）
assets.description: 次数Tab - 用户每日吸奶次数区间分布（用户日粒度）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH session_cnt AS (
    SELECT evt_dt, uid, COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId) AS pump_sessions
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
    WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
      AND uid IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY evt_dt, uid
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN pump_sessions = 1                THEN '1次'
        WHEN pump_sessions = 2                THEN '2次'
        WHEN pump_sessions = 3                THEN '3次'
        WHEN pump_sessions = 4                THEN '4次'
        WHEN pump_sessions = 5                THEN '5次'
        WHEN pump_sessions BETWEEN 6 AND 10   THEN '6-10次'
        WHEN pump_sessions BETWEEN 11 AND 20  THEN '11-20次'
        ELSE '21+次'
    END                                                            AS 每日次数区间,
    CASE
        WHEN pump_sessions = 1  THEN 1
        WHEN pump_sessions = 2  THEN 2
        WHEN pump_sessions = 3  THEN 3
        WHEN pump_sessions = 4  THEN 4
        WHEN pump_sessions = 5  THEN 5
        WHEN pump_sessions BETWEEN 6  AND 10  THEN 6
        WHEN pump_sessions BETWEEN 11 AND 20  THEN 11
        ELSE 21
    END                                                            AS 排序,
    COUNT(*)                                                       AS 用户日数,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() * 100, 1)               AS 占比_pct
FROM session_cnt
GROUP BY 每日次数区间, 排序
ORDER BY 排序"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q16 · 用户累计总次数分布
assets.description: 次数Tab - 用户累计吸奶总次数区间分布（用户粒度）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH user_total AS (
    SELECT uid, COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId) AS total_sessions
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
    WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
      AND uid IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY uid
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN total_sessions = 1                  THEN '1次'
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 2 AND 5      THEN '2-5次'
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 6 AND 10     THEN '6-10次'
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 11 AND 20    THEN '11-20次'
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 21 AND 50    THEN '21-50次'
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 51 AND 100   THEN '51-100次'
        ELSE '100+次'
    END                                                        AS 累计次数区间,
    CASE
        WHEN total_sessions = 1                  THEN 1
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 2 AND 5      THEN 2
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 6 AND 10     THEN 6
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 11 AND 20    THEN 11
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 21 AND 50    THEN 21
        WHEN total_sessions BETWEEN 51 AND 100   THEN 51
        ELSE 101
    END AS 排序,
    COUNT(uid)                                                 AS 用户数,
    ROUND(COUNT(uid) / SUM(COUNT(uid)) OVER() * 100, 1)       AS 占比_pct
FROM user_total
GROUP BY 累计次数区间, 排序
ORDER BY 排序"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q27 · 模式调节路径 Top6
assets.description: 习惯Tab - 模式调节路径 Top6（DWD层，调节次数+占比）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    CONCAT(
        CASE adjustfrom
            WHEN '0' THEN '刺激' WHEN '1' THEN '泌乳'
            WHEN '2' THEN '混合' WHEN '3' THEN '自定义'
            ELSE adjustfrom END,
        ' → ',
        CASE adjustto
            WHEN '0' THEN '刺激' WHEN '1' THEN '泌乳'
            WHEN '2' THEN '混合' WHEN '3' THEN '自定义'
            ELSE adjustto END
    )                                              AS 调节路径,
    COUNT(*)                                       AS 调节次数,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() * 100, 1) AS 占比_pct
FROM lute_app_dw.dwd_tp_app_breast_pump_log_di
WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
  AND eventname = 'pump_manual_adjust_evt'
  AND evttype = 'pump_mode'
  AND adjustfrom IS NOT NULL
  AND adjustto IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 调节路径
ORDER BY 调节次数 DESC
LIMIT 6"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q28 · 调节行为汇总 KPI
assets.description: 习惯Tab - 模式和档位调节行为汇总KPI（会话维度）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId)                                                  AS 总会话数,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mode_adj_cnt  > 0 THEN useSessionId END)             AS 有模式调节的会话数,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN level_adj_cnt > 0 THEN useSessionId END)             AS 有档位调节的会话数,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mode_adj_cnt  > 0 THEN useSessionId END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId), 0) * 100, 1)                       AS 模式调节占比_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN level_adj_cnt > 0 THEN useSessionId END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId), 0) * 100, 1)                       AS 档位调节占比_pct,
    ROUND(SUM(mode_adj_cnt)  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId), 0), 2)        AS 次均模式调节次数,
    ROUND(SUM(level_adj_cnt) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId), 0), 2)        AS 次均档位调节次数
FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q29 · 每次吸奶模式调节次数分布
assets.description: 习惯Tab - 每次吸奶中模式调节次数分布柱状图
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH md AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN mode_adj_cnt >= 10 THEN 10 ELSE mode_adj_cnt END AS adj_times
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
    WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN adj_times >= 10 THEN '10次+' ELSE CAST(adj_times AS VARCHAR) END AS 调节次数,
    adj_times                                                                    AS 排序,
    COUNT(*) AS 会话数,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() * 100, 1) AS 占比_pct
FROM md
GROUP BY 调节次数, 排序
ORDER BY 排序"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q31 · 结束模式×档位交叉分布
assets.description: 习惯Tab - 结束模式×结束档位交叉分布表（各模式内占比）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    CASE finalModeType
        WHEN 'stimulation' THEN '刺激'
        WHEN 'expression'  THEN '泌乳'
        WHEN 'massage'     THEN '按摩/混合'
        WHEN 'custom'      THEN '自定义'
        ELSE finalModeType
    END AS 结束模式,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(finalSuctionLevel AS INT) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN '1-3档'
        WHEN CAST(finalSuctionLevel AS INT) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN '4-6档'
        WHEN CAST(finalSuctionLevel AS INT) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN '7-9档'
        ELSE '9+档'
    END AS 结束档位区间,
    COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId) AS 会话数,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId)
        / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId)) OVER (PARTITION BY finalModeType) * 100, 1) AS 模式内占比_pct
FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
  AND finalModeType IS NOT NULL
  AND finalSuctionLevel IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 结束模式, 结束档位区间, finalModeType
ORDER BY finalModeType, MIN(CAST(finalSuctionLevel AS INT))"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q32 · 混合模式使用分布
assets.description: 习惯Tab - 单次吸奶使用模式数量分布（单一/混合2种/混合3+种）
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN usedModeCount = 1  THEN '单一模式'
        WHEN usedModeCount = 2  THEN '混合 2 种'
        WHEN usedModeCount >= 3 THEN '混合 3+ 种'
        ELSE '未知'
    END AS 模式混合类型,
    CASE
        WHEN usedModeCount = 1  THEN 1
        WHEN usedModeCount = 2  THEN 2
        WHEN usedModeCount >= 3 THEN 3
        ELSE 0
    END AS 排序,
    COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId)                                                   AS 会话数,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId) / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId)) OVER() * 100, 1) AS 占比_pct
FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
  AND usedModeCount IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 模式混合类型, 排序
ORDER BY 排序"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: [吸奶器] Q33 · 暂停行为统计
assets.description: 习惯Tab - 暂停行为统计：有暂停占比、次均暂停次数、各次数分布
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN pause_cnt > 0 THEN 1 END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(useSessionId), 0) * 100, 1)                      AS 有暂停行为的进程占比_pct,
    ROUND(SUM(pause_cnt)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN pause_cnt > 0 THEN 1 END), 0), 1)      AS 次均暂停次数,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN pause_cnt = 0 THEN 1 END)                            AS 无暂停_0次,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN pause_cnt = 1 THEN 1 END)                            AS 暂停1次,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN pause_cnt = 2 THEN 1 END)                            AS 暂停2次,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN pause_cnt >= 3 THEN 1 END)                           AS 暂停3次以上,
    COUNT(useSessionId)                                                   AS 总会话数
FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_df
WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
  AND pause_cnt IS NOT NULL"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: AI吸乳计划首次创建_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "WITH ranked_data AS (
    -- 1. 核心精髓：在同一个全量流里，各排各的队，互不干扰
    SELECT
        to_date(create_time) AS event_date,
        uid,
        batch_id,
        -- 对 uid 按时间顺向排队
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY uid ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn_uid,
        -- 对 batch_id 按时间顺向排队
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY batch_id ORDER BY create_time ASC) AS rn_batch
    FROM
        dwd_usr_t_user_scheduled_reminder_calendar_df
    WHERE
        task_type = 5
)

-- 2. 最终展现层：利用条件聚合（Conditional Aggregation）直接收网
SELECT
    event_date AS `日期`,
    -- 只有当 uid 拿到第 1 名时，才说明今天是它的“首秀”，计入总数
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rn_uid = 1 THEN uid END) AS `首次创建AI吸乳计划用户数`,
    -- 只有当 batch_id 拿到第 1 名时，才说明今天是它的“首秀”，计入总数
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rn_batch = 1 THEN batch_id END) AS `新建AI吸乳计划数`
FROM
    ranked_data
where 
	event_date >= '2026-04-01' 
	and event_date <= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY
    1
ORDER BY
    1 DESC;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: [吸奶器] 各模式人均每日吸奶次数
assets.description: 统计期内各模式总session数 / 日均DAU，反映不同模式的使用频率差异
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH mode_daily AS (
    SELECT evt_dt,
        modeType AS mode_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT useSessionId) AS sess_cnt
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_session_mode_df
    WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
    GROUP BY evt_dt, modeType
),
dau_daily AS (
    SELECT evt_dt, SUM(dau) AS dau
    FROM lute_app_dw.dws_pump_daily_df
    WHERE evt_dt BETWEEN '2026-05-01' AND '2027-05-31'
    GROUP BY evt_dt
)
SELECT
    CASE m.mode_type
        WHEN 'stimulation' THEN '刺激模式'
        WHEN 'expression'  THEN '泌乳模式'
        WHEN 'massage'     THEN '按摩/混合'
        WHEN 'custom'      THEN '自定义'
        ELSE m.mode_type
    END AS 模式,
    ROUND(SUM(m.sess_cnt) / NULLIF(SUM(d.dau), 0), 4) AS 人均每日吸奶次数
FROM mode_daily m
JOIN dau_daily d ON m.evt_dt = d.evt_dt
GROUP BY m.mode_type
ORDER BY 人均每日吸奶次数 DESC"
    }
  ]
}
warnings: Synced metadata only. Query execution remains read-only and row-limited.

    left join report_dashboard t4 on t1.dashboard_id = t4.id
    where t1.started_at is not null
)
select * from query_execution_data
where email = 'athena.pan@rootglobal.net'
order by started_at desc
limit 100"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 数据集-- 帖子维度互动数据
assets.description: 报表
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "

SELECT
    -- 日期（发帖日）
    STR_TO_DATE(art_create_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `日期`,
    art_uid as `作者`,
    t.cid `帖子id`,
    title `帖子标题`,

    -- -- 1. 发帖基础指标
    -- COUNT(DISTINCT cid) AS UGC发帖量,
    -- COUNT(DISTINCT art_uid) AS UGC发帖用户数,

    -- 2. 帖子触达（观看/互动覆盖数）
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN v.ugc_post_id IS NOT NULL THEN t.cid END) AS `被浏览帖子数`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.type IN ('1','2','4','5') THEN t.cid END) AS `有互动的帖子数`,

    -- 3. 观看类指标（归属发帖日）
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.uid) AS `UGC浏览用户数`,
    count(distinct v.uid,v.ugc_post_id) AS `帖子有效浏览次数`,

    -- 4. 互动用户类指标（去重）
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.type IN ('1','2','4','5') THEN t.uid END) AS `UGC总互动用户数`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.type = '4' THEN t.uid END) AS `UGC收藏用户数`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.type = '5' THEN t.uid END) AS `UGC评论用户数`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.type = '1' THEN t.uid END) AS `UGC点赞文章用户数`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.type = '2' THEN t.uid END) AS `UGC点赞评论用户数`,

    -- 5. 互动次数类指标
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN t.type IN ('1','2','4','5') THEN concat(t.uid,t.cid,t.type,t.mid) END) AS `UGC总互动次数`,
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN t.type = '4' THEN concat(t.uid,t.cid,t.type,t.mid) END) AS `UGC收藏次数`,
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN t.type = '5' THEN concat(t.uid,t.cid,t.type,t.mid) END) AS `UGC评论次数`,
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN t.type = '1' THEN concat(t.uid,t.cid,t.type,t.mid) END) AS `UGC文章点赞次数`,
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN t.type = '2' THEN concat(t.uid,t.cid,t.type,t.mid) END) AS `UGC评论点赞次数`

FROM 
  dwd_app_user_article_info t

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ugc_post_id,
        uid,
        ugc_posy_browse_cn
    FROM dwd_app_user_ugc_detail_info_df
) v ON t.cid = v.ugc_post_id
left join 
  (select distinct  cid,title
  from dwd_user_article_info_df ) x on t.cid = x.cid
where  article_type = 'ugc' 
GROUP BY STR_TO_DATE(art_create_date, '%Y-%m-%d'),art_uid,t.cid,title",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "


select 
	t1.dt,count(distinct t1.uid),count(distinct t2.uid)
from 
(
	select 
		t1.dt,t1.uid,count(*)
	from 
		dwd_usr_t_device_event_di t1
	left join 
		dwd_usr_t_device_df t2 
	on t1.device_id=t2.id
	where  
		event_type=10 and t1.data_source='EC'
		and t2.model in ('M9','M5P0','Air1') 
	group by t1.dt,t1.uid 
) t1 
left JOIN
(
	SELECT
	    dt + INTERVAL -1 DAY AS dt,
	    uid,
	    COUNT(*) AS event_cnt
	FROM dwd_tp_app_log_di
	GROUP BY dt + INTERVAL -1 DAY, uid
) t2 

on t1.uid=t2.uid and t1.dt=t2.dt
group by t1.dt
order by t1.dt desc",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}
