assets.title: 帖子数据_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "WITH base_params AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 60) AS start_date,
        DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 1) AS end_date
),

-- OGC文章类型映射（全量，不限deleted）
ogc_type_map AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        id AS cid,
        CASE category_type WHEN 1 THEN 'OGC-知识星球' WHEN 2 THEN 'OGC-活动运营' END AS ogc_type,
        deleted,
        from_unixtime(create_time_stamp / 1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dt_x
    FROM dwd_usr_t_lute_community_article_df
),

-- 全量文章类型映射（UGC + OGC）
article_dim_map AS (
    SELECT cid, ogc_type AS dim FROM ogc_type_map WHERE ogc_type IN ('OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营')
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT cid, 'UGC' AS dim FROM dwd_user_article_info_df WHERE art_type = 'ugc'
),

-- 浏览明细
browse_detail AS (
	select  event_date, uid, post_id,COALESCE(y.dim, 'OGC-未知') AS dim
	from 
	    (SELECT event_date, uid, post_id--, 'UGC' AS dim
	    FROM dwd_app_user_flag_info
	    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(split(item_id_arr, ',')) AS t(post_id)
	    WHERE COALESCE(item_id_arr, '') <> ''
	        AND event_date BETWEEN (SELECT start_date FROM base_params) AND (SELECT end_date FROM base_params)
	    
	    UNION ALL
	    
	    SELECT a.event_date, a.uid, t.post_id--, COALESCE(m.ogc_type, 'OGC-未知')
	    FROM dwd_app_user_flag_info a
	    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(split(a.ogc_item_id_arr, ',')) AS t(post_id)
	    --LEFT JOIN ogc_type_map m ON t.post_id = m.cid
	    WHERE COALESCE(a.ogc_item_id_arr, '') <> ''
	        AND a.event_date BETWEEN (SELECT start_date FROM base_params) AND (SELECT end_date FROM base_params)) x 
	left join article_dim_map y on x.post_id = y.cid
),

-- 发帖明细（仅deleted=0）
post_detail AS (
    SELECT TO_DATE(art_create_time) AS dt, cid, uid, 'UGC' AS dim
    FROM dwd_user_article_info_df
    WHERE deleted = 0 AND art_type = 'ugc'
        AND TO_DATE(art_create_time) BETWEEN (SELECT start_date FROM base_params) AND (SELECT end_date FROM base_params)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT dt_x AS dt, cid, NULL AS uid, ogc_type AS dim
    FROM ogc_type_map 
    WHERE deleted = 0
),

-- 互动明细（含投票，type=6）
interact_detail AS (
    SELECT 
        x.event_date AS dt,
        x.uid,
        x.cid,
        CASE WHEN x.article_type = 'ugc' THEN 'UGC' ELSE COALESCE(m.ogc_type, 'OGC-未知') END AS dim,
        x.type,
        x.mid
    FROM dwd_app_user_article_info x
    LEFT JOIN ogc_type_map m ON x.cid = m.cid
    WHERE x.event_date BETWEEN (SELECT start_date FROM base_params) AND (SELECT end_date FROM base_params)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        TO_DATE(v.create_time) AS dt,
        v.uid,
        v.article_id AS cid,
        COALESCE(a.dim, '未知') AS dim,
        6 AS type,
        NULL AS mid
    FROM dwd_usr_t_community_article_vote_record_df v
    LEFT JOIN article_dim_map a ON v.article_id = a.cid
    WHERE TO_DATE(v.create_time) BETWEEN (SELECT start_date FROM base_params) AND (SELECT end_date FROM base_params)
),

-- ==========================================
-- 分维度统计
-- ==========================================
browse_stats AS (
    SELECT event_date AS dt, dim,
        COUNT(1) AS browse_pv,
        COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS browse_uv,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(uid, '_', post_id)) AS valid_browse
    FROM browse_detail
    WHERE dim IN ('UGC', 'OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营')
    GROUP BY event_date, dim
),

post_stats AS (
    SELECT dt, dim,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cid) AS post_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS post_user
    FROM post_detail
    WHERE dim IN ('UGC', 'OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营')
    GROUP BY dt, dim
),

interact_stats AS (
    SELECT dt, dim,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type IN (1,2,4,5,6) THEN uid END) AS interact_uv,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN 1 END) AS collect_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN cid END) AS collect_art,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN uid END) AS collect_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN 1 END) AS comment_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN cid END) AS comment_art,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN uid END) AS comment_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS digg_comment_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN mid END) AS digg_comment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN uid END) AS digg_comment_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN 1 END) AS digg_art_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN cid END) AS digg_art,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN uid END) AS digg_art_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN 1 END) AS vote_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN cid END) AS vote_post_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN uid END) AS vote_user_cnt
    FROM interact_detail
    WHERE dim IN ('UGC', 'OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营')
    GROUP BY dt, dim
)

-- 合并分维度
--merged_data AS 

-- ==========================================
-- 最终输出：分维度 + 合计（中文列名）
-- ==========================================
select 日期,
	维度,
	发帖的总量,
	发帖的用户量,

	浏览量,
	浏览用户数,
	有效浏览量,
	COALESCE(有效浏览量/浏览用户数, 0) AS 人均有效浏览量,

	互动的用户总量,
	帖子收藏的总量,
	收藏的帖子量,
	收藏的用户量,
	评论的总量,
	评论的帖子量,
	评论的用户量,
	评论点赞的总量,
	点赞的评论量,
	评论点赞的用户量,
	帖子点赞的总量,
	点赞的帖子数量,
	帖子点赞的用户量,
	投票次数,
	被投票的帖子数,
	投票的用户数 
from 
(
SELECT dt AS `日期`, dim AS `维度`,
    browse_pv AS `浏览量`, browse_uv AS `浏览用户数`, valid_browse AS `有效浏览量`,
    post_cnt AS `发帖的总量`, post_user AS `发帖的用户量`,
    interact_uv AS `互动的用户总量`,
    collect_cnt AS `帖子收藏的总量`, collect_art AS `收藏的帖子量`, collect_user AS `收藏的用户量`,
    comment_cnt AS `评论的总量`, comment_art AS `评论的帖子量`, comment_user AS `评论的用户量`,
    digg_comment_cnt AS `评论点赞的总量`, digg_comment AS `点赞的评论量`, digg_comment_user AS `评论点赞的用户量`,
    digg_art_cnt AS `帖子点赞的总量`, digg_art AS `点赞的帖子数量`, digg_art_user AS `帖子点赞的用户量`,
    vote_cnt AS `投票次数`, vote_post_cnt AS `被投票的帖子数`, vote_user_cnt AS `投票的用户数`
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(b.dt, p.dt, i.dt) AS dt,
        COALESCE(b.dim, p.dim, i.dim) AS dim,
        COALESCE(b.browse_pv, 0) AS browse_pv,
        COALESCE(b.browse_uv, 0) AS browse_uv,
        COALESCE(b.valid_browse, 0) AS valid_browse,
        COALESCE(p.post_cnt, 0) AS post_cnt,
        COALESCE(p.post_user, 0) AS post_user,
        COALESCE(i.interact_uv, 0) AS interact_uv,
        COALESCE(i.collect_cnt, 0) AS collect_cnt,
        COALESCE(i.collect_art, 0) AS collect_art,
        COALESCE(i.collect_user, 0) AS collect_user,
        COALESCE(i.comment_cnt, 0) AS comment_cnt,
        COALESCE(i.comment_art, 0) AS comment_art,
        COALESCE(i.comment_user, 0) AS comment_user,
        COALESCE(i.digg_comment_cnt, 0) AS digg_comment_cnt,
        COALESCE(i.digg_comment, 0) AS digg_comment,
        COALESCE(i.digg_comment_user, 0) AS digg_comment_user,
        COALESCE(i.digg_art_cnt, 0) AS digg_art_cnt,
        COALESCE(i.digg_art, 0) AS digg_art,
        COALESCE(i.digg_art_user, 0) AS digg_art_user,
        COALESCE(i.vote_cnt, 0) AS vote_cnt,
        COALESCE(i.vote_post_cnt, 0) AS vote_post_cnt,
        COALESCE(i.vote_user_cnt, 0) AS vote_user_cnt
    FROM browse_stats b
    FULL OUTER JOIN post_stats p ON b.dt = p.dt AND b.dim = p.dim
    FULL OUTER JOIN interact_stats i ON COALESCE(b.dt, p.dt) = i.dt AND COALESCE(b.dim, p.dim) = i.dim
) x

UNION ALL

-- OGC-活动运营 + UGC
SELECT 
    COALESCE(b.dt, p.dt, i.dt) AS `日期`,
    'OGC-活动运营+UGC' AS `维度`,
    COALESCE(b.browse_pv, 0), COALESCE(b.browse_uv, 0), COALESCE(b.valid_browse, 0),
    COALESCE(p.post_cnt, 0), COALESCE(p.post_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.interact_uv, 0),
    COALESCE(i.collect_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.collect_art, 0), COALESCE(i.collect_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.comment_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.comment_art, 0), COALESCE(i.comment_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.digg_comment_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_comment, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_comment_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.digg_art_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_art, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_art_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.vote_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.vote_post_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.vote_user_cnt, 0)
FROM (
    SELECT event_date AS dt, COUNT(1) AS browse_pv, COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS browse_uv,
           COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(uid, '_', post_id)) AS valid_browse
    FROM browse_detail WHERE dim IN ('OGC-活动运营', 'UGC') GROUP BY event_date
	) b
	FULL OUTER JOIN (
	    SELECT dt, COUNT(DISTINCT cid) AS post_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS post_user
	    FROM post_detail WHERE dim IN ('OGC-活动运营', 'UGC') GROUP BY dt
	) p ON b.dt = p.dt
	FULL OUTER JOIN (
	    SELECT dt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type IN (1,2,4,5,6) THEN uid END) AS interact_uv,
	        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN 1 END) AS collect_cnt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN cid END) AS collect_art,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN uid END) AS collect_user,
	        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN 1 END) AS comment_cnt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN cid END) AS comment_art,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN uid END) AS comment_user,
	        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS digg_comment_cnt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN mid END) AS digg_comment,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN uid END) AS digg_comment_user,
	        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN 1 END) AS digg_art_cnt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN cid END) AS digg_art,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN uid END) AS digg_art_user,
	        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN 1 END) AS vote_cnt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN cid END) AS vote_post_cnt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN uid END) AS vote_user_cnt
	    FROM interact_detail WHERE dim IN ('OGC-活动运营', 'UGC') GROUP BY dt
	) i ON COALESCE(b.dt, p.dt) = i.dt

UNION ALL

-- OGC+UGC
SELECT 
    COALESCE(b.dt, p.dt, i.dt) AS `日期`,
    'OGC+UGC' AS `维度`,
    COALESCE(b.browse_pv, 0), COALESCE(b.browse_uv, 0), COALESCE(b.valid_browse, 0),
    COALESCE(p.post_cnt, 0), COALESCE(p.post_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.interact_uv, 0),
    COALESCE(i.collect_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.collect_art, 0), COALESCE(i.collect_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.comment_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.comment_art, 0), COALESCE(i.comment_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.digg_comment_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_comment, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_comment_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.digg_art_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_art, 0), COALESCE(i.digg_art_user, 0),
    COALESCE(i.vote_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.vote_post_cnt, 0), COALESCE(i.vote_user_cnt, 0)
FROM (
    SELECT event_date AS dt, COUNT(1) AS browse_pv, COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS browse_uv,
           COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(uid, '_', post_id)) AS valid_browse
    FROM browse_detail WHERE dim IN ('UGC', 'OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营') GROUP BY event_date
) b
FULL OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT dt, COUNT(DISTINCT cid) AS post_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS post_user
    FROM post_detail WHERE dim IN ('UGC', 'OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营') GROUP BY dt
) p ON b.dt = p.dt
FULL OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT dt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type IN (1,2,4,5,6) THEN uid END) AS interact_uv,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN 1 END) AS collect_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN cid END) AS collect_art,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 4 THEN uid END) AS collect_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN 1 END) AS comment_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN cid END) AS comment_art,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 5 THEN uid END) AS comment_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS digg_comment_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN mid END) AS digg_comment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN uid END) AS digg_comment_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN 1 END) AS digg_art_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN cid END) AS digg_art,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN uid END) AS digg_art_user,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN 1 END) AS vote_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN cid END) AS vote_post_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN type = 6 THEN uid END) AS vote_user_cnt
    FROM interact_detail WHERE dim IN ('UGC', 'OGC-知识星球', 'OGC-活动运营') GROUP BY dt
) i ON COALESCE(b.dt, p.dt) = i.dt

) x 
where 日期 >=(SELECT date_add(start_date,1) FROM base_params)
ORDER BY `日期` DESC, `维度`"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: ari1 绑定设备时，每次习惯连几个
assets.businessDomain: 正彬 李的个人集合

assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "

SELECT
    device_num,
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS distinct_uid,
    COUNT(DISTINCT log_unique_key) AS total_log,
    COUNT(DISTINCT single_device_id) AS distinct_device_id
FROM (
    SELECT
        get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') AS device_num,
        uid,
        CONCAT(dt, '-', CAST(id AS VARCHAR)) AS log_unique_key,
        SPLIT(get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id'), ',') AS device_id_arr
    FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
    WHERE
        get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') = 'Air1'
        AND elementid = '31800001'
        AND dt >= '2026-05-01'
) t1
-- StarRocks旧版标准炸裂语法，去掉LATERAL，逗号连接UNNEST
, UNNEST(t1.device_id_arr) AS t2(single_device_id)
-- 过滤空MAC、空格脏数据
WHERE TRIM(single_device_id) != ''
GROUP BY device_num;



select * from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di limit 23",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: ari1 绑定设备时，连接多次
assets.businessDomain: 正彬 李的个人集合
tags: 正彬 李的个人集合
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "
with t1 as 
(

SELECT
    uid,
	single_device_id,
	count(*) as connect_num

FROM (
    SELECT
        get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') AS device_num,
        uid,
        CONCAT(dt, '-', CAST(id AS VARCHAR)) AS log_unique_key,
        SPLIT(get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id'), ',') AS device_id_arr
    FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
    WHERE
        get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') = 'Air1'
        AND elementid = '31800002' and get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result')= 'success'
        AND dt >= '2026-05-01'
) t1
-- StarRocks旧版标准炸裂语法，去掉LATERAL，逗号连接UNNEST
, UNNEST(t1.device_id_arr) AS t2(single_device_id)
-- 过滤空MAC、空格脏数据
WHERE TRIM(single_device_id) != ''
GROUP BY    
	uid,
	single_device_id
);

SELECT connect_num as 连接次数,count(distinct single_device_id ) as  设备数量 from t1 group by connect_num order by connect_num asc;



select *,		from_unixtime(CAST(writetime/ 1000 AS BIGINT)) AS event_dt
 from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di where uid='2043811277059228946'   order by writetime asc limit 2323;
-------------------
with t1 as (
select deviceid,count(distinct uid) users
from 
dwd_app_device_binding_info
where  model='Air1'
group by deviceid

)
select users as 绑定过几台手机 ,count(distinct deviceid) as 绑定设备数量 from t1 group by users order by users asc;






WITH user_event AS (
    SELECT
 uid,
         elementid event_name,
MIN(writetime) AS first_event_ms
    FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
    WHERE
       ( (get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') = 'Air1'
        AND elementid = '31800002' and get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result')= 'success'
		) or elementid in ('12600010' ,'12600001' )
		)
        AND dt >= '2026-05-01'
	    GROUP BY uid, elementid

		
),
user_a_b_pair AS (
    SELECT
        a.uid,
        a.first_event_ms AS time_a_ms,
        b.first_event_ms AS time_b_ms,
        b.first_event_ms - a.first_event_ms AS diff_ms -- 毫秒差值
    FROM user_event a
    INNER JOIN user_event b
    ON a.uid = b.uid
    AND a.event_name = '31800002'
    AND b.event_name in ('12600010' ,'12600001' )
)
SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid) AS total_user_do_A, -- 完成A的全部用户
    -- 条件：B毫秒 > A毫秒（严格A先发生）且间隔≤60000毫秒(1分钟)
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN diff_ms >= 0 AND diff_ms <= 60000 THEN uid END) AS user_ab_within_1min,
    -- 转化率保留2位小数
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN diff_ms >=0 AND diff_ms <= 60000 THEN uid END) * 100.0
        / COUNT(DISTINCT uid),
        2
    ) AS conversion_rate_pct
FROM user_a_b_pair;
"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: AI吸乳计划埋点分析_original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT 
    dt,
    home_page_click_uv AS `首页点击UV`,
    smart_click_uv AS `Smart点击UV`,
    device_control_click_uv AS `吸奶器控制页点击UV`,
    entry_total_click_uv AS `生成计划入口总点击UV`,
    questionnaire_start_uv AS `问卷开始填写UV`,
    entry_to_start_rate AS `点击入口->开始填写漏斗率`,
    questionnaire_complete_uv AS `问卷填写完成UV`,
    start_to_complete_rate AS `开始填写->填写完成漏斗`,
    plan_generate_success_uv AS `计划生成成功UV`,
    complete_to_generate_rate AS `填写完成->计划生成成功漏斗`,
    calendar_sync_uv AS `日程同步日UV`,
    generate_to_sync_rate AS `计划生成成功->同步日历漏斗`,
    entry_to_sync_rate AS `点击入口->同步日历漏斗`
FROM dws_app_breast_pump_plan_generate_di
ORDER BY dt DESC;


--原逻辑
-- SELECT
--     to_date(x.dt) dt,
--     -- 基础点击指标
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12400011' THEN x.uid END) AS 首页点击UV,
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12400012' or (elementid ='12400047' and GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.extraData.page_id')='smart_mom_page') THEN x.uid END) AS Smart点击UV,
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12400013' or (elementid ='12400047' and GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.extraData.page_id')='device_control_page') THEN x.uid END) AS 吸奶器控制页点击UV,
--     -- 漏斗 UV 阶梯
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid IN ('12400011','12400012','12400013','12400047') THEN x.uid END) AS 生成计划入口总点击UV,
  
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid in ('12400014','12400022')  THEN x.uid END) AS 问卷开始填写UV,
	
--     ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid in ('12400014','12400022') THEN x.uid END)
--         / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') IN ('12400011','12400012','12400013','12400047') THEN x.uid END), 0), 1), 5) AS `点击入口->开始填写漏斗率`,
    
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') in ('12400015','12400030') THEN x.uid END) AS 问卷填写完成UV,
	
--     ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') in ('12400015','12400030') THEN x.uid END)
--         / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid in ('12400014','12400022') THEN x.uid END), 0), 1), 5) AS `开始填写->填写完成漏斗`,

--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') in ('12400020','12400121') THEN x.uid END) AS 计划生成成功UV,
--     ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') in ('12400020','12400121') THEN x.uid END)
--         / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') in ('12400015','12400030') THEN x.uid END), 0), 1), 5) AS `填写完成->计划生成成功漏斗`,
    
--     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') = '12400021' and CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) <= 229 and GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion') like '2.%') or elementid = '12400122' THEN x.uid END) AS 日程同步日UV,
	
--     ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') = '12400021' and CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) <= 229 and GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion') like '2.%') or elementid = '12400122' THEN x.uid END)
--         / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') in ('12400020','12400121') THEN x.uid END), 0), 1), 5) AS `计划生成成功->同步日历漏斗`,
		
    
--     ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN (GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') = '12400021' and CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) <= 229 and GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion') like '2.%') or elementid = '12400122'  THEN x.uid END)
--         / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') IN ('12400011','12400012','12400013','12400047') THEN x.uid END), 0), 1), 5) AS `点击入口->同步日历漏斗`

-- FROM dwd_tp_ai_log_di x 
-- -- 通过 JOIN 过滤出“有过入口点击行为”的用户
-- JOIN (
--     SELECT DISTINCT dt, uid 
--     FROM dwd_tp_ai_log_di 
--     WHERE dt >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) 
--       AND dt >= '2026-04-26' 
--       AND elementid IN ('12400011','12400012','12400013','12400047')
--       AND (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 226 and GET_JSON_OBJECT(content, '$.appVersion') like '2.%')
-- ) y ON x.dt = y.dt AND x.uid = y.uid

-- WHERE x.dt >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) 
--   AND x.dt >= '2026-04-26'
--   AND (
--       GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.elementId') IN ('12400011','12400012','12400013','12400014','12400015','12400020','12400021','12400047','12400022','12400030','12400121','12400122')
--       OR x.eventname IN ('APP Start', 'app_page_view')
--   )
--   AND (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion'), 1, 6), '.', '') AS INT) >= 226 and SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion'),2,1) = '.' and  SUBSTR(GET_JSON_OBJECT(x.content, '$.appVersion'),1,1)>1)
-- GROUP BY to_date(x.dt)
-- ORDER BY dt ASC;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 原子化组件主链路数据
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    dt, -- 日期

    -- ===================== 环节1：进入连接设备环节（起始点）
    SUM(CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN (
        '12600002', -- 首页添加设备点击
        '12600003', -- 首页添加设备
        '12600004', -- 首页扫一扫
        '31800003'  -- 自动发现卡片曝光
    ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 进入连接场景pv,--step1_entry_pv, -- 环节1：进入连接设备环节-PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN (
        '12600002','12600003','12600004','31800003'
    ) THEN uid END) AS 进入连接场景uv,--step1_entry_uv, -- 环节1：进入连接设备环节-UV

    -- ===================== 环节2：点击连接设备（第二环节）
    SUM(CASE WHEN
        -- 12600001：connect / try_again
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600001'
         AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again'))
        -- 12600007：设备发现列表-点击连接
        OR get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600007'
        -- 12600008：结果页-重试
        OR get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600008'
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 点击连接设备pv,--step2_click_connect_pv, -- 环节2：点击连接设备-PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600001'
         AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again'))
        OR get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600007'
        OR get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600008'
    THEN uid END) AS 点击连接设备uv,--step2_click_connect_uv, -- 环节2：点击连接设备-UV

    -- ===================== 环节3：配网发起（31800001）
    SUM(CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001'
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 开始配网pv,--step3_connect_start_pv, -- 环节3：配网发起次数-PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001'
        THEN uid END) AS 开始配网uv,--step3_connect_start_uv, -- 环节3：发起配网用户-UV

    -- ===================== 环节4：配网结束（31800002）
    SUM(CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002'
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 配网结束pv,--step4_connect_end_pv, -- 环节4：配网结束次数-PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002'
        THEN uid END) AS 配网结束uv,--step4_connect_end_uv, -- 环节4：配网结束用户-UV

    -- ===================== 环节5：配网成功（connect_result=success）
    SUM(CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002'
        AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success'
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 配网成功pv,--step5_connect_success_pv, -- 环节5：配网成功次数-PV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002'
        AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success'
        THEN uid END) AS 配网成功uv,--step5_connect_success_uv, -- 环节5：配网成功用户-UV

    -- ===================== 核心转化率
    -- 环节1 → 环节2 转化率
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600001' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again'))
        OR get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN ('12600007','12600008')
    THEN uid END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN ('12600002','12600003','12600004','31800003') THEN uid END),0), 3
    ) AS rate_step1_to_step2_uv,

    -- 环节2 → 环节3 转化率
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN
        (get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '12600001' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again'))
        OR get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN ('12600007','12600008') THEN uid END),0), 3
    ) AS rate_step2_to_step3_uv,

    -- 环节3 → 环节5 最终成功率（核心）
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN uid END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END), 0), 3
    ) AS final_success_rate_uv,

    -- 平均配网时长（秒）
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002'
         AND get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.duration') > 0
		 and get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.duration') < 1000*60*60
         THEN get_json_object(content, '$.extraData.duration')/1000 END), 2
    ) AS avg_connect_duration_sec

FROM dwd_tp_app_log_di
WHERE dt >= '2026-03-01'
  AND dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)
  AND get_json_object(content, '$.elementId') IN (
    '12600002','12600003','12600004','31800003',
    '12600001','12600007','12600008',
    '31800001','31800002'
)
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY dt DESC;





"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 原子化组件埋点——开始连接/结束连接_original
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS 日期,
    uid AS 用户ID,
    get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS 系统,
   -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') AS 页面来源,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS 设备型,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') AS 网络连接方式,
    
    -- 设备连接开始 PV
	if(
	COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN 1 END) <COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN 1 END),
	COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN 1 END),
	COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN 1 END) 
	) AS 设备连接开始pv,
	--COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN 1 END) AS 设备连接开始pv,
    
    -- 设备连接结束 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN 1 END) AS 设备连接结束pv,
    
    -- 连接成功 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS 连接成功pv

FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
WHERE
    -- 取昨日数据
    FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    
    -- 只统计连接相关埋点
    AND get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') IN ('31800001','31800002')
    
    -- 过滤无效数据
    AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData') IS NOT NULL
   

GROUP BY 
    FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    uid ,
    get_json_string(content, '$.os'),
   -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id'),
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model'),
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type')

ORDER BY 
    日期 DESC, 
    系统






	"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: dt维度—连接开始/结束
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
    dt AS `日期`,
    -- uid AS 用户ID,
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS 系统,
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') AS 页面来源,
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS 设备型,
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') AS 网络连接方式,

    -- 设备连接开始 PV
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END) AS 设备连接开始uv,
    
    -- 设备连接结束 PV
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN uid END) AS 设备连接结束uv,
	COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN uid END)
		/COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END) `连接开始-结束uv漏斗`,
    
    -- 连接成功 PV
    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN uid END) AS 连接成功uv,

    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN uid END) `连接结束-成功uv漏斗`,

    COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT(distinct CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END) `连接开始-成功uv漏`,	
		  
    -- 设备连接开始 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN 1 END) AS 设备连接开始pv,
    
    -- 设备连接结束 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN 1 END) AS 设备连接结束pv,
	COUNT( CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN uid END)
		/COUNT( CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END) `连接开始-结束pv漏斗`,	
    
    -- 连接成功 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS 连接成功pv,
		  
    COUNT( CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT( CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' THEN uid END) `连接结束-成功pv漏斗`,

    COUNT( CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800002' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT( CASE WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') = '31800001' THEN uid END) `连接开始-成功pv漏斗`		  

FROM dwd_tp_app_log_di
WHERE
    -- 取昨日数据
    dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
    
    -- 只统计连接相关埋点
    AND get_json_string(content, '$.elementId') IN ('31800001','31800002')
    
    -- 过滤无效数据
    AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData') IS NOT NULL
   

GROUP BY 
    dt
    -- uid ,
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.os'),
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id'),
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model'),
    -- get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type')

ORDER BY 
    日期 DESC",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 原子组件埋点数据-连接结束original
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select 
	a.*,IF(b.uid is not null,'是','否') 是否一次配网结果
from 
	(SELECT
    ---dt AS `日期`,
	FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS `日期`,
	CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT) eventtime,
	FROM_UNIXTIME(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')/1000) 事件触发时间,
	get_json_object(content,'$.appVersion') appversion,
    uid AS `用户ID`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS `os`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.model') AS `手机型号`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.brand') AS `手机品牌`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.timezoneOffset') AS `时区`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.languageCode') AS `语言`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') AS `来源页`,
    case when get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') is null or get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') = 0 then 1 else get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') end AS `绑定设备数`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_flow_sub_id') AS `配网子链路`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') AS `连接网络`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS `设备类型`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_type') AS `连接类型`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.error_info') AS `失败原因`,
	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') AS device_unique_id,
	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') AS `是否来自自动发现卡片`,

    -- 耗时：毫秒转秒，保留2位小数
	case when get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration')<0 then 3
		when get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration') >= 180000 then 180
	    else get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration') / 1000 end AS `耗时(秒)`,

	CASE 
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN '连接成功'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'interrupt' THEN '手动中断退出'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'connect_fail' THEN '连接失败'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'interact_fail' THEN '交互失败'
	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'report_fail' THEN '接口失败'
		
	    ELSE '其他' 
	END AS 配网结果
FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di    --select * from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
WHERE
    dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 40 DAY)
	and FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 40 DAY)
    AND dt >= '2026-03-27'
    AND elementid IN ('31800002')
    AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData') IS NOT NULL
    AND uid IS NOT NULL) a
	
left join 

	(select 
	   distinct x.dt,x.uid,x.eventTime_next
	from 
		(select 
		    ----to_date(dt) dt,
			FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dt,
		    uid,
		    get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') as eventTime,
			get_json_object(content,'$.appVersion') as appversion,
		    elementid,
		    get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId') as eventSessionId,
		    get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id') as device_unique_id,
			get_json_object(content,'$.os') as os,
			get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.from_page_id') as from_page_id,
			get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_num') as device_num,
			get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_connection_type') as device_connection_type,
			get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_model') as device_model,
			get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') as is_auto_discovery_card,
		
		    -- 1. 统一分组：dt,uid,会话ID,设备ID,元素ID
		    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
		        PARTITION BY 
		            dt,
		            uid,
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
		            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id'),
		            elementid 
		        ORDER BY 
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
		    ) as rn,
		
		    -- 3. 按 dt,uid 分组的全局序号（保留）
		    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
		        PARTITION BY 
		            dt,uid 
		        ORDER BY 
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
		    ) as rn_user,
		
		    -- ===================== 核心修改 =====================
		    -- 统一分区：dt,uid,eventSessionId,device_unique_id
		    LEAD(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime'), 1) OVER (
		        PARTITION BY 
		            dt,
		            uid,
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
		            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id')
		        ORDER BY 
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
		    ) as eventTime_next,
		    
		    LEAD(elementid, 1) OVER (
		        PARTITION BY 
		            dt,
		            uid,
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
		            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id')
		        ORDER BY 
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
		    ) as elementid_next,
	
		    LEAD(get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.connect_result'), 1) OVER (
		        PARTITION BY 
		            dt,
		            uid,
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventSessionId'),
		            get_json_object(content,'$.extraData.device_unique_id')
		        ORDER BY 
		            get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')
		    ) as connect_result_next		
		    
		from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di 
		where dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 40 DAY) and FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 40 DAY) 
		  and elementid in ('31800001','31800002')
	) x
	where elementid = '31800001' and rn = 1 and elementid_next = '31800002') b on a.日期 = b.dt and a.eventtime = b.eventTime_next and a.用户ID = b.uid
-- SELECT
--     ---dt AS `日期`,
-- 	FROM_UNIXTIME(CAST(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime') AS BIGINT)/1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS `日期`,
-- 	FROM_UNIXTIME(get_json_object(content,'$.eventTime')/1000) 事件触发时间,
-- 	get_json_object(content,'$.appVersion') appversion,
--     uid AS `用户ID`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS `os`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.model') AS `手机型号`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.brand') AS `手机品牌`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.timezoneOffset') AS `时区`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.languageCode') AS `语言`,
--     get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') AS `来源页`,
--     get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_num') AS `绑定设备数`,
--     get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_flow_sub_id') AS `配网子链路`,
--     get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_connection_type') AS `连接网络`,
--     get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_model') AS `设备类型`,
--     get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_type') AS `连接类型`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.error_info') AS `失败原因`,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.device_unique_id') AS device_unique_id,
-- 	get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.is_auto_discovery_card') AS `是否来自自动发现卡片`,


--     -- 耗时：毫秒转秒，保留2位小数
--     if(get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration')<0,0,get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration')) / 1000 AS `耗时(秒)`,

-- 	CASE 
-- 	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'success' THEN '连接成功'
-- 	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'interrupt' THEN '手动中断退出'
-- 	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'connect_fail' THEN '连接失败'
-- 	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'interact_fail' THEN '交互失败'
-- 	    WHEN get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.connect_result') = 'report_fail' THEN '接口失败'
		
-- 	    ELSE '其他' 
-- 	END AS 配网结果
-- FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di    --select * from dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
-- WHERE
--     dt >= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 60 DAY)
--     AND dt >= '2026-03-27'
--     AND elementid IN ('31800002')
--     AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData') IS NOT NULL
--     AND uid IS NOT NULL

"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 自动连接设备卡片关键链路数据-天维度
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
    dt AS `日期`,
    --get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS `系统`,

    -- ===================== 漏斗 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN 1 END) AS `自动发现卡片曝光数`,
    --COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN 1 END) AS `自动发现卡片有效访问_PV`,
    
    -- 【关键修正】只统计 connect / try_again 有效开始连接点击
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN 1 END) AS `连接点击数`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN 1 END)
		  /COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN 1 END) AS `曝光->点击pv漏斗`,		  

    -- ===================== 漏斗 UV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN uid END) AS `自动发现卡片曝光UV`,
    --COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN uid END) AS `自动发现卡片有效访问_UV`,
    
    -- 【关键修正】UV 也只统计 connect / try_again
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN uid END) AS `有效开始连接点击UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN uid END)  AS `曝光->点击uv漏斗`,

    -- ===================== 平均停留时长（秒）
    avg(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration') END) / 1000 AS `平均停留时长(秒)`

FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
WHERE
    dt >= '2026-03-27'
    AND elementid IN ('31800003', '31800004', '12600001')
    AND uid IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY
    dt
   -- `系统`

ORDER BY
    `日期` DESC;
    --`系统`;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 自动连接设备卡片关键链路数据-OS维度
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "SELECT
    dt AS `日期`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.os') AS `系统`,

    -- ===================== 漏斗 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN 1 END) AS `自动发现卡片曝光数`,
    --COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN 1 END) AS `自动发现卡片有效访问_PV`,
    
    -- 【关键修正】只统计 connect / try_again 有效开始连接点击
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN 1 END) AS `连接点击数`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN 1 END)
		  /COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN 1 END) AS `曝光->点击pv漏斗`,		  

    -- ===================== 漏斗 UV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN uid END) AS `自动发现卡片曝光UV`,
    --COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN uid END) AS `自动发现卡片有效访问_UV`,
    
    -- 【关键修正】UV 也只统计 connect / try_again
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN uid END) AS `有效开始连接点击UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN uid END)  AS `曝光->点击uv漏斗`,

    -- ===================== 平均停留时长（秒）
    avg(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration') END) / 1000 AS `平均停留时长(秒)`

FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
WHERE
    dt >= '2026-03-27'
    AND elementid IN ('31800003', '31800004', '12600001')
    AND uid IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY
    dt,
    `系统`

ORDER BY
    `日期` DESC,
    `系统`;"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 自动连接设备卡片关键链路数据-来源页维度
assets.businessDomain: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
tags: IoT配网联路 看板过程文件
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
    dt AS `日期`,
    get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.from_page_id') AS `来源页`,

    -- ===================== 漏斗 PV
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN 1 END) AS `自动发现卡片曝光数`,
    --COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN 1 END) AS `自动发现卡片有效访问_PV`,
    
    -- 【关键修正】只统计 connect / try_again 有效开始连接点击
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN 1 END) AS `连接点击数`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN 1 END)
		  /COUNT(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN 1 END) AS `曝光->点击pv漏斗`,		  

    -- ===================== 漏斗 UV
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN uid END) AS `自动发现卡片曝光UV`,
    --COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN uid END) AS `自动发现卡片有效访问_UV`,
    
    -- 【关键修正】UV 也只统计 connect / try_again
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN uid END) AS `有效开始连接点击UV`,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '12600001' 
          AND get_json_string(content, '$.extraData.element_name') IN ('connect','try_again') 
          THEN uid END)
		  /COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN elementid = '31800003' THEN uid END)  AS `曝光->点击uv漏斗`,

    -- ===================== 平均停留时长（秒）
    avg(CASE WHEN elementid = '31800004' THEN get_json_int(content, '$.extraData.duration') END) / 1000 AS `平均停留时长(秒)`

FROM dwd_tp_atomic_component_log_di
WHERE
    dt >= '2026-03-27'
    AND elementid IN ('31800003', '31800004', '12600001')
    AND uid IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY
    dt,
    `来源页`

ORDER BY
    `日期` DESC,
    `来源页`;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 吸奶器注册用户数-original
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select *
from 
	(SELECT
	    dt AS 日期,
	    SUM(m9) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS 累计M9用户,
	    SUM(m5p0) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS 累计M5P0用户,
	    SUM(air1) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS 累计Air1用户,
		SUM(m10) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS 累计M10用户
	FROM (
	    SELECT
	        to_date(app_active_date) AS dt,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bind_model LIKE '%M9%' THEN uid END) AS m9,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bind_model LIKE '%M5P0%' THEN uid END) AS m5p0,
	        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bind_model LIKE '%Air1%' THEN uid END) AS air1,
			COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bind_model LIKE '%M10%' THEN uid END) AS m10
	    FROM dws_app_user_tag_info_df
	    WHERE app_active_date IS NOT NULL
	    GROUP BY to_date(app_active_date)
	) t
	) x	
where 日期 >= '2025-01-01'
ORDER BY 日期 desc;",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 用户版本分布
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "SELECT
  STR_TO_DATE(dt, '%Y-%m-%d') 日期,
  app_version AS appVersion,
  os,
  count(1) 用户量,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY
      STR_TO_DATE (dt, '%Y-%m-%d'),
      os
    ORDER BY
      COUNT(1) DESC
  ) AS 排序
FROM
  dwd_tp_version_os_log_di
WHERE
  dt >= date_sub (current_date(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  
GROUP BY
  STR_TO_DATE (dt, '%Y-%m-%d'),
  app_version,
  os
order by 
	日期 desc,os,排序",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}

assets.title: 用户活跃率_original
assets.businessDomain: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
tags: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据
assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native",
      "native": "select 
  STR_TO_DATE(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d') 日期 ,
  model,country_locate_state,sum(day90_bind_device_user_cn) 绑定用户数,sum(day90_bind_device_user_app_act_cur_cn) 活跃用户数
  --,sum(day90_bind_device_user_app_act_cur_cn)/sum(day90_bind_device_user_cn) 活跃率
from 
  ads_breast_pump_app_device_act_info_df   --select * from ads_breast_pump_app_device_act_info_df x
WHERE
  busi_date>= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 120 DAY) --and model != 'W1'
group by 
  STR_TO_DATE(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d'),model,country_locate_state
  
union all
  
select x.busi_date 日期,'M10' model,country_locate_state,count(y.uid) 绑定用户数,count(i.uid) 活跃用户数
from 
  (select distinct busi_date --discint event_date 
  from ads_breast_pump_app_device_act_info_df
  where busi_date >= '2026-03-22') x
left join   

	(select uid,to_date(min(dev_create_time)) bind_date
	from dwd_app_device_binding_info
	where model = 'W1'
		and status = 1
	group by uid) y on datediff(x.busi_date, y.bind_date) BETWEEN 0 and 89
join 
	(select country_locate_state,app_active_date,uid
	from dws_app_user_tag_info_df 
	where bind_model = 'W1') z on y.uid = z.uid
left join 
	(select distinct event_date,uid
	from dwd_app_user_flag_info 
	where event_date >= '2026-03-01' ) i on y.uid = i.uid and x.busi_date = i.event_date
group by 1,2,3

  "
    }
  ]
}

assets.businessDomain: 90天内绑定吸奶器活跃率数据

assets.queryText:
{
  "lib/type": "mbql/query",
  "database": 4,
  "stages": [
    {
      "native": "select 
	x.dt 日期,
	model,
	x.uv/y.uv 用户占比
from 
	(select 
	  STR_TO_DATE(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d') dt ,
	  model,--country_locate_state,
	  sum(day90_bind_device_user_cn) uv
	from 
	  ads_breast_pump_app_device_act_info_df x  
	WHERE
	  busi_date>= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 120 DAY)
	  and model !='ALL'
	group by 
	  STR_TO_DATE(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d'),model) x 
join
    (select STR_TO_DATE(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d') dt ,sum(day90_bind_device_user_cn) uv from ads_breast_pump_app_device_act_info_df 
  	WHERE busi_date>= date_sub(current_date(), INTERVAL 120 DAY) and model !='ALL' group by STR_TO_DATE(busi_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) y on x.dt = y.dt",
      "lib/type": "mbql.stage/native"
    }
  ]
}
